subject: A key district could come down to just hundreds of votes.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Committee to Re-Elect Linda Sanchez
body:
Will you rush a donation to help Harley Rouda get out the vote in California's 48th District? [](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-linda?refcode=RTW_181104_Rouda_EM&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
Peter, never doubt that just a handful of votes can make a difference.

This summer, Linda was working hard on behalf of Harley Rouda, a Democratic challenger in an Orange County district (CA-48) that will help decide control of the House. **In the end, Rouda won his primary by just 126 votes.** [](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180719_ls_rouda?refcode=RTW_181104_Rouda_EM&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Now, he's up against right-wing incumbent and Trump apologist Dana Rohrabacher. Political observers think the result on November 6 could be just as close as it was in the primary.

[**Harley Rouda needs every dollar he can get in these last 48 hours so his team can keep contacting voters -- because every vote could be decisive. Can you help us raise $4,800 for him by tomorrow night?**](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180719_ls_rouda?refcode=RTW_181104_Rouda_EM&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between Harley Rouda and Linda S anchez:_ | | ******[Chip in $10 immediately>>](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/1503669b/4ac3d62d/69fabf80/1ce2a798/3172188139/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180719_ls_rouda?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=RTW_181104_Rouda_EM")******

******[Or donate another amount>>](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180719_ls_rouda?refcode=RTW_181104_Rouda_EM&recurring=auto&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")******

[**Stand with her and support Harley Rouda now!**](http://ca.voteforlinda. name: Willie Nelson, betofortexas.com
subject: Beto’s the real deal
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

My friend Beto's the real deal. I really like and respect the way he's
been going about trying to get elected: he’s been to every county in
Texas. He’s knocked on lots of doors. That’s really hard work -- and it
looks like it might just pay off.

I'm proud to support Beto in his campaign for U.S. Senate, and I'm happy
to have a small cameo in Beto's brand-new ad, “On The Road Again.” You’re
one of Beto’s biggest supporters -- so I wanted to be sure you saw it
first.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/16182?refcode=ema20181104&t=1001&akid=23727%2E444211%2EkoHjkp ]Click here to watch Beto's new ad, then kick in a few bucks -- $5, $10,
whatever you can afford -- to keep it on the airwaves.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/16182?refcode=ema20181104&t=1002&akid=23727%2E444211%2EkoHjkp ]Beto for Texas

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/16182?refcode=ema20181104&t=1003&akid=23727%2E444211%2EkoHjkp ]Watch Beto's new ad »

A lot of people seemed surprised that I’m backing a candidate -- but it
ain’t my first rodeo. Plus, Beto knows his way around a guitar, and he's
got a really great attitude. And the more time I spend with him, the more
I know Texans can count on Beto to work hard for us in the Senate.

And his opponent? Well, at the end of the day ... if you don't like 'em,
vote 'em out. And on November 6, that's exactly what we're gonna do.

Willie Nelson

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/16165?refcode=ema20181104&t=1022&akid=23727%2E444211%2EkoHjkp ]Contribute
$3
»

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-email?refcode=em20181105footer&t=1023&akid=23727%2E444211%2EkoHjkp

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betofortexas.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=23727%2E444211%2EkoHjkp

P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

subject: Join us in PRAYER!
body:
|

| Peter, Jesus declared: “For where two or three gather in my name, there am I with them” (Matthew 18:20). We need God’s presence and His wisdom for the elections on Tuesday. So, we are uniting to pray together the night before the elections! Will you join us? **_Unite in Prayer on Monday_** **Monday, November 5, 2018
****Join us on[MyFaithVotes.live](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=W3Yb-TMNiCpf2bUXWC85Gnd4eolm_H4K51fjeBfVBCw&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181104com01&n=1 "MyFaithVotes.live") or the [My Faith Votes Facebook page](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=-seqDhhx2BUd84N4jj3iUzEsoLrSbBKYqmLHiXrIAq4WQC21c7Iw3UgSI1O5aKBH&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181104com01&n=2 "My Faith Votes
Facebook Page")
****3:30pm PT | 4:30 pm MT | 5:30pm CT | 6:30pm ET** We will send a text reminder directly to your phone so you remember to tune in to our [MyFaithVotes.live website](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=W3Yb-TMNiCpf2bUXWC85Gnd4eolm_H4K51fjeBfVBCw&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181104com01&n=3 "MyFaithVotes.live"), our [Facebook page](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=-seqDhhx2BUd84N4jj3iUzEsoLrSbBKYqmLHiXrIAq4WQC21c7Iw3UgSI1O5aKBH&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181104com01&n=4 "My Faith
Votes Facebook Page"), or silently pray with us from wherever you are—at work, at home, or at school. **Text PRAY to 40649 from your mobile phone to receive your reminder to pray with us!** Imagine the unstoppable force of thousands of believers across the country joining together simultaneously praying for God’s will to be done in our communities and our nation! **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO

name: Team Leah
subject: Final Week - Get Out and Vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leah for Senate
body:
Here's your final update from Team Leah before Election Day: First, remember to get out and vote on Tuesday for Leah!*|MC_PREVIEW_TEXT|* |
---
| | |
---
| | | November 4, 2018

Here's your final update from Team Leah before Election Day:
---
| **First, remember to get out and vote on Tuesday for Leah! **

This week, Leah was endorsed by**Condoleezza Rice, the Milwaukee Police Association, and the US Chamber of Commerce.**
---
| Leah spent the final week before Election Day traveling the state on her Wisconsin Way tour. She was joined by a number of special guests including **Vice President Mike Pence, Speaker Ryan and Eric Trump**.
---
|
---
---
| Leah stopped at cafes, factories, GOP victory offices and other community events on the final lap of her tour across the state to share her message of taking effective leadership and her passion as a nurse and a mom to the U.S. Senate.
---
|
---
|
---
---
|
## News from the campaign

## [Wisconsin Public Radio: Leah Vukmir Keeps Tomah VA Scandal Front And Center In Race Against US Sen. Tammy Baldwin](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=00219ca128da42508cb9e1ef76cba5fd&_e=GCBI5uSDS1HMr-uIrIB0-yP4MjSLNjtmrL_IdiiSVt-EiCKEgB9kfGTYV5t2CpAr9_79Dgjy6I-fG2T2WZrSosAdBrzgbXx8Yssf1xj1NhOCtnAetKoa2boLqoEDObl83PLSTG8QboA9-iDflQQdhDSyKOGgH9YSQIQCbvfdrsv7lce3K7HDbcXtfrkyy6keSmHs_C-DqgFurdZ-J6toNjGsxWsWtQvlCKYTqfhTXWbXe6g-bV40UIo3Ngx2kXCsYbXMO4m2ba9zNEuu88W9tA8yiBArwVCv-O2UCk38G8NZEdYmWmCUPqvM0AxgVG7cULP1HgI2ZjW-2uuhe-Ly2NYnRB_eLQgv9RY5mvZ8-9E%3D)

"The Tomah VA issue, in particular, really speaks to her character and whether or not people can trust her for another six years," Vukmir said at a recent campaign event in Tomah. "If she cannot hold our veterans in high regard and if she cannot be accountable to our veterans, then how will she be accountable to the rest of us in our state and how will she be accountable to lead in Washington?"

The whistleblower, Ryan Honl, has continued to criticize the senator. Honl did not respond to an interview request for this story, but he recently told the Milwaukee Journal Sentinel it's "immoral" to vote for Baldwin in this year’s election.

## [Washington Examiner: Underdog Republican hugs Trump on immigration](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=00219ca128da42508cb9e1ef76cba5fd&_e=GCBI5uSDS1HMr-uIrIB0-5N1w_smszBIAg9P7YemUFUDFQ4pzqDVQkjb3bMyRBuZj3pjNWm-7WPVwmxbGkWdW65FczfPgLteLRVeGliE9uLNfkl-KqDI4GDoNKhFcH1NwPaRW1nmb2_JhZrVxTb7rgjPQxyBa6XxCvH2fe4iRVZpg5pZnEJAvRY0TYpTXk54LJ_Vz7JF2sv68E8GJSRKFhXYEcqWLktVKyXwP2PpE_v59tTKyxcNkhLnmpTmuBzC2Ywk0yOcdp2k3e3d9QugFwJEfxSmjH_ms7pwCeZuU1Zso7661ZuJCEz4Iht66_c28yvKvMNIu9asefimGVV8U7TqGoygZmm07-rCOYA6rb8%3D)
Vukmir said she’s found immigration reform to be a top priority for Republican voters. A Kaiser Family Foundation poll in October backed her up, finding that Republicans saw it as one of the most important issues in how they’ll vote.

“I’m the daughter of Greek immigrants and I really believe that we are a nation of laws, which must be upheld. Right now, people are taking advantage of our porous borders,” she told reporters.

At three campaign stops with House Speaker Paul Ryan, R-Wis., and Republican Gov. Scott Walker on Thursday, Vukmir was the only one to bring up Trump without being prompted, tearing into her Democratic opponent for obstructing the president’s immigration policies.

“They stand for open borders. They stand for sanctuary cities,” she said, referring to Democrats. “Tammy Baldwin is not afraid of that. Tammy Baldwin voted against Kate’s Law.”
## [La Crosse Tribune: Leah Vukmir: Door open for murderers, rapists, terrorists](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=00219ca128da42508cb9e1ef76cba5fd&_e=GCBI5uSDS1HMr-uIrIB0-7UaNOvXXlOzqxHS3AyUh35w-gAHkeGH4bCbTVuBNlHW8ZkxLCBcNLQr7KvXRqUTGOUv7QWejCwmrOX2uA_i8JzcorLrUXwzxXo9QoLyaLRaDL9zg8wtIKvaMg01xaGXAJ_pethAc9zR41kb3XhSlLfCjTdD6d98uHWu8CT9BFl2Huh1zVu2UiyVmok5NWwS_hFon342Zj13WQnQIzmkwR_ajfMhbvyCULKxnLgossLzmsZMhTP7xQmvoOruH9D8HyeqBZ31kd5COdHM-LzQLbEk9ThoqQGXirEteP7Ri_J2xWklm3ZfwOWjQJ728FJfKjPtJ0xWxDuw8dXo8jRJKiMXoctB7Nh_sbO9O1a-Kt_QuL2wjMuIN-QZy1xMV_mAwpCIacgY_9E8zt4JJ7wk5EMlyy12ustQY9riFPIGTgzg)
I know all too well the value immigrants add to society. I grew up in a big, fat Greek family. My father immigrated from Greece. I had the privilege of teaching my aunts and uncles English as they assimilated into our wonderful country.

My family earned their citizenship by going through a legal process, and because of it, they are intensely proud to be American citizens. Baldwin is cheapening the value of American citizenship.
## [The Cap Times: Leah Vukmir: Baldwin’s health care plan is 'Chaos-for-all'](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=00219ca128da42508cb9e1ef76cba5fd&_e=GCBI5uSDS1HMr-uIrIB0-39oVtzgSY1e-XP_u19NcKv2gMYnyIiovUP7vhMoPd6Q2eEaz0SfuneSv_N__Z64jwmia7wa9QP9B_tkR59CssBjL3ihvFiMklBgjbTmzkGtt0g5nFIJxoXPjO7VEqkzlpEp-KyKwRmiO4VnLvc2INUKZIWUUVTkggfHCgrXUFDLhuZM6MKeHZiVcD5KOnvxCglzqYywi4Gk8BIcWHjDCXP6cu0W80BcKQ9FdzyQNOiUM4EwV84wkAzR6glrpWh4FZDPC8T6hiNBGboAZUspWy1LR-EdbLcC0CbooCPCmhWqVpJyEIC-rIbtjoRfPmpT6Rm006ROybEQlJ2qxlFSRLkHctDnbwZocg_xiamFd8TIhB_lCbPRqqInZA45P-QctMCkpwUT-uLfqQERADoBSfY%3D)
Medicare-for-all” is a lie; it’s actually “Chaos-for-all.” Radicals like Baldwin know seniors overwhelmingly approve of Medicare. Unfortunately, her promises are empty and dishonest. The mistakes of Obamacare will pale in comparison to Baldwincare. Reimbursement rates will drop significantly, access to doctors will decrease, and the quality of care patients receive will drastically diminish. All the while, taxpayers will be left to foot a budget-busting $32 trillion bill — doubling federal income taxes for everyone. Make no mistake about it, this is socialism. The United States will no longer be known for exceptional care. Rather, our health care quality and astronomical taxes will mimic other countries with government-run health care.
## [Post Crescent: Leah Vukmir, Scott Walker campaign in Fox Cities ahead of Tuesday election](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=00219ca128da42508cb9e1ef76cba5fd&_e=GCBI5uSDS1HMr-uIrIB0-wiIcJXKnhPT_CbB_zEz86MNiS3rDARhJMGJClsha_TNBQFciouBsNxfqXVcdic90u2JnHCsELFkP-TosvHgrew2lC4neKadXsZqf-VA7OFpHbP8dHb7GT5ywAyC_0TTkIswG3t7i_z0C6k6C9BGPhCbuY16eKX7rgnBC83a2fZQ5YZAzYaRrFrhHf389Bf2oVSvV-NT_cmO9bp2mTqmXf-InNUNvOGXZKas9QNp2CmmnoPejK2V7X7fUO0_OUUr0fjZcaAum-pF3XXswbkvsCnndR3kDO5vztPWezlaYAiAN7NndIWpcsk_ff5IpkbWQfGVNt2unfV1I0xPE97vVFkJMqGQN1E2516EDi8yC2Vs)
Vukmir took shot after shot at Baldwin during her Appleton stop. In front of a vocal crowd, Vukmir criticized Baldwin's Medicare-for-all approach to health care, claiming Baldwin's plan would kick about 3.4 million Wisconsin residents off of employer-based insurance. Vukmir also promised to protect people with pre-existing conditions, saying she would "fall in front of a truck" before she let people go without that coverage. Vukmir also criticized Baldwin, who she called “Taxin’ Tammy,” and claimed Baldwin had voted to raise taxes more than 400 times. “I understand the day-to-day challenges of families and I won’t forget you,” she said.

name: Key Race Alert: PA Senate
subject: Bob Casey (D-PA) needs your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e7f81/51dbcc2a/153e8bca/3ac8aea/1979930454/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/")
Here's what you need to know, team:

Bob's opponent, Congressman Lou Barletta recently made his **_biggest ad buy yet_** , so we need to be prepared to defend Bob's record in these crucial final days of the campaign.

Barletta loves to attack Bob's record of fighting for Pennsylvania families, but we know the truth. Bob is a fighter for middle-class Pennsylvanians -- he protects our health care, defends Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security and is a firewall against the most dangerous pieces of the Trump agenda. We need to make sure that _every. single. voter._ knows that going into Election Day, and we only have _two days_ left to share Bob's message.

**It's going to take each and every one of us to show Pennsylvania voters that Bob is fighting for them. A group of donors has agreed to match up to $30,000 in donations from this grassroots network by the end of this weekend -- can you give $5 (becomes $10) to help spread Bob's message by midnight tonight?** _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Donate $5 (Becomes $10)](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20181104_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5")** **[Donate $25 (Becomes $50)](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20181104_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50")** **[Or click here to donate another amount](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20181104_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")** Thanks.

| | Bob needs a strong team to help keep this Senate seat blue so he can continue to protect Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security, fight for working families and be a check on the Trump administration.

Will you make your first donation to help out?
[DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20181104_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Donald Trump won Ohio by eight points in 2016
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|

| | Peter, When you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work. You fight for the parent who is working three jobs to support her family. You fight for workers, who deserve decent wages and working conditions. **You fight for the dignity of work.** On Tuesday, I want to show this country that when we focus on putting workers first -- and fight like hell for all Americans regardless of their background, gender, or income -- you can win in Ohio. At this time two years ago, we thought Hillary Clinton would be our next President. Donald Trump won Ohio by _8 points_ in 2016. With Renacci closing the gap in the polls, we can't leave anything to chance. [**My team needs to raise $28,500 for our final push to turn out voters on Election Day. I 'm personally asking for your help: Can you give $5, $10, or match our online average contribution of $26?**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd4d/4462dc26/75be6341/201f1c21/2437227174/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMTA0cG0zIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ He is banking on Ohio being the red state that went for Donald Trump. Frankly Peter, that's why Donald Trump is coming back to campaign for Renacci tomorrow. But with your help, Peter, we can defeat Congressman Renacci. We can win. And we can continue fighting for workers' rights, women's rights, and human rights -- together. clean_body: | | | Peter, When you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work. You fight for the parent who is working three jobs to support her family. You fight for workers, who deserve decent wages and working conditions. You fight for the dignity of work. On Tuesday, I want to show this country that when we focus on putting workers first -- and fight like hell for all Americans regardless of their background, gender, or income -- you can win in Ohio. At this time two years ago, we thought Hillary Clinton would be our next President. Donald Trump won Ohio by 8 points in 2016. With Renacci closing the gap in the polls, we can't leave anything to chance. "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" My opponent, multi-millionaire Congressman Jim Renacci, is hoping this race is called for him early in the night. He is banking on Ohio being the red state that went for Donald Trump. Frankly Peter, that's why Donald Trump is coming back to campaign for Renacci tomorrow. But with your help, Peter, we can defeat Congressman Renacci. We can win. And we can continue fighting for workers' rights, women's rights, and human rights -- together. "" | | | "" With immense gratitude, Sherrod | "" "" | | Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown Contributions or gifts to Friends of Sherrod Brown are not tax deductible.

subject: no rest for us
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | Don't forget to change your clocks. And don't forget to [**give $5 or more toward our all-important $15,000 GOTV goal.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ce4/622b7b5b/1dcfd08d/307b62d7/2500399756/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse181104pm?refcode=dwse181104pm_m&recurring=true&amount=5") We're still behind, according to the finance team. Here's a link you can use: [**www.DebbieWassermanSchultz.com/GOTV**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ce4/622b7b5b/1dcfd08d/307b62d7/2500399756/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse181104pm?refcode=dwse181104pm_m&recurring=true&amount=5") Most people look forward to the end of Daylight Savings because it's an extra hour of rest. But we're just two days from the most important election in recent memory. **There is no rest for us.** We need a huge GOTV effort. We need to get every last Democratic voter we can find to the polls. That takes time, effort, and yes -- money. Your contributions make all the difference, trust me. [**So if you can, give tonight.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ce4/622b7b5b/1dcfd08d/307b62d7/2500399756/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse181104pm?refcode=dwse181104pm_m&recurring=true&amount=5") [**www.DebbieWassermanSchultz.com/GOTV**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ce4/622b7b5b/1dcfd08d/307b62d7/2500399756/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse181104pm?refcode=dwse181104pm_m&recurring=true&amount=5") Debbie Sent from my iPad. Sorry for any typos _\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: ALERT@DebbieWassermanSchultz.com
Subject: one EXTRA hour_ Daylight Savings Time ended at 2 am this morning you know. You got an extra hour of sleep -- and we get an extra hour of fundraising. Which is great, because for this tight election, we need every hour we can get. [**Debbie told you we need to raise $15,000 for our final-week GOTV efforts, and we're still behind. Will you give $5 or more?**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ce4/622b7b5b/1dcfd08d/307b62d7/2500399756/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse181104pm?refcode=dwse181104pm_m&recurring=true&amount=5") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ce4/622b7b5b/1dcfd08d/307b62d6/2500399756/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiI4NjE3NjkiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkd3NlMTgxMTA0cG0iLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dwse181104pm?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=dwse181104pm_m_5&refcode2=861769")** **[Express Donate: $10](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ce4/622b7b5b/1dcfd08d/307b62d6/2500399756/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiI4NjE3NjkiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkd3NlMTgxMTA0cG0iLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMTAiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dwse181104pm?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=dwse181104pm_m_10&refcode2=861769")** **[Express Donate: $25](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ce4/622b7b5b/1dcfd08d/307b62d6/2500399756/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiI4NjE3NjkiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkd3NlMTgxMTA0cG0iLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMjUiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dwse181104pm?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=dwse181104pm_m_25&refcode2=861769")** **[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ce4/622b7b5b/1dcfd08d/307b62c9/2500399756/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiI4NjE3NjkiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkd3NlMTgxMTA0cG0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dwse181104pm?refcode=dwse181104pm_m_other&refcode2=861769")** At least one Koch-linked group has attacked Debbie in this election. Her opponents smear her constantly. The GOP would love to see her lose her job in Congress -- she's one of their most outspoken opponents. But this isn't just about Debbie. This election is about something bigger. It's about rejecting Donald Trump and his hate-filled, fear-mongering rhetoric. It's about showing Republicans that we will not stand for their put-the-rich-first, anti-working family agenda. It's about electing Democrats up and down the ballot who will fight for our jobs, our communities, our health care, our environment, and all the rest of our priorities. **Debbie is a part of that fight and so are we.[Help get us to this goal and get in the resources to win big victories on Election Day. Rush in whatever amount makes sense for you >>](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ce4/622b7b5b/1dcfd08d/307b62d7/2500399756/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse181104pm?refcode=dwse181104pm_m&recurring=true&amount=5")** Thanks! Team DWS

name: Gillum Hustle Army
subject: Hey, have you joined Andrew Gillum's Texting Crew?
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb35f0/9e00690/56bc1add/2400bc2e/3559991458/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/")
Friends,

So here's the deal: you can come into one of our offices or sit in the comfort of your home and talk to literally thousands of voters in less than two hours. Sounds too good to be true? Well, it's not.

You can help Andrew Gillum become the next Governor of Florida by helping us Text Out the Vote!

[TEXT NOW!](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb35f0/9e00690/56bc1add/2400bc21/3559991458/VEsE/ "https://events.mobilizeamerica.io/gillumforgovernor/event/83873/")
We need to reach voters all over Florida between now and Tuesday with critical info like their polling locations, but we can't do it without you!

**[Sign up here right now to be part of the Gillum Texting Crew! ](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb35f0/9e00690/56bc1add/2400bc21/3559991458/VEsF/ "https://events.mobilizeamerica.io/gillumforgovernor/event/83873/")**

Thank you,

Gillum Hustle Army

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor.

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek -- we're two days out from Election Day and our team is working hard in every corner and every congressional district in Virginia. We're $20,100 short from our goal to bring this campaign to a victorious end, with just two days to do it. There are a lot of people counting on us hitting this goal. Can you spare $5 tonight to throw in the pot for me and our Virginia Democrats? You can do that here: [https://secure.timkaine.com/November](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10a8/3e0906/7548d425/3e377ec3/3174293671/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-november?refcode=20181104_3_FR_TK_two-days-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+httpssecuretimkainecomNovember&utm_campaign=20181104_3_FR_TK_two-days-LDND&source=20181104_3_FR_TK_two-days-LDND") Thanks, as always, for reading. Try to get a good night's rest tonight, and I'll try to do the same. Because we have hard work to do making sure all our families and friends get to the polls on Tuesday.

_Tim_ | [**DONATE**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10a8/3e0906/7548d425/3e377ec2/3174293671/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-november?refcode=20181104_3_FR_TK_two-days-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20181104_3_FR_TK_two-days-LDND&source=20181104_3_FR_TK_two-days-LDND")

name: Jody Casey, betofortexas.com
subject: We have to catch up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

Wanted to send you a quick update because we are running behind on our
fundraising. We need to raise roughly $150,000 tonight to get back on
track and stay on pace to reach our goal. If we fall short, we’ll have to
cut back significantly on our final advertising budget for the last few
days.

In a close election that could come down to just a few thousand votes,
this final push could make the difference. So I need to ask you right now:

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181104&t=1019&akid=23938%2E444211%2EZnqRtN ]Please add your first

$3

name: StaceyAbrams.com
subject: [Georgia] Join us for our Election Night Watch Party!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
Help us celebrate our people-powered movement! |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa7ef/34a064cc/3a33c02/70ce30c/37050400/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Hey there - This Tuesday, November 6th, the Abrams for Governor campaign will host an Election Night Watch Party -- and it wouldn't be the same without you. Join us! **The most**** important part of Election Day is ensuring everyone casts their ballot first. **Then, if you are able, please sign up for one (or two) more volunteer shifts to knock on doors. That's how we win -- and after the polls close, we celebrate. Doors will not open until 8:30 PM. We anticipate that results will roll in late into the night, so there will be plenty of time to enjoy the party. **There will be enhanced security and strict access protocols in place. **To ensure everyone's safety, please be prepared to go through airport-style security. You will receive full details and a list of prohibited items in your confirmation email. **What:** Abrams for Governor Election Night Watch Party
**Where:** Hyatt Regency, Regency Ballroom
Atlanta, GA 30303
**When:** Tuesday, November 6
**Doors open:** 8:30 PM **Guests are asked to RSVP using the button below.** **[RSVP](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa7ef/34a064cc/3a33c02/70ce30d/37050400/VEsE/ "https://abrams.bsd.net/ENightParty")** Join us as we watch the results and celebrate all that we have built together. We're in the home stretch, friend, and we can do this -- we can lead Georgia forward. [**Sign up for a volunteer shift (or two!) to help Get Out the Vote.**](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa7ef/34a064cc/3a33c02/70ce30a/37050400/VEsF/ "https://abrams.bsd.net/GOTVEvents") Then join Stacey Abrams, supporters, and local leaders on Tuesday, November 6th. See you there, Team Abrams
---

name: Maureen Braun
subject: Stand With My Husband
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Braun for Indiana
body:
Peter,

I cannot express to you how grateful I am for your love and support over this long campaign. When Mike and I decided that it was time to bring his conservative values and experience as a successful business owner to Washington, you stood with us from day one. Thank you.

The time is finally here to make good on the promises we’ve made to paint a brighter future for Hoosier families by retiring Joe Donnelly and electing a real leader to the Senate.

Friend, my husband needs you one more time.

I’m asking you to stand with me as I stand with my husband, Mike Braun, and send a message to the Washington Swamp that we are ready for Hoosier Values in DC rather than radical partisanship.

This Tuesday, I’m asking you to vote for Mike for Senate, and let’s ensure that the brightest days for Hoosier families are always ahead of us, never behind.

Sincerely,

Maureen Braun

P.S. Don’t forget to text, call, and email your friends and family and remind them that Tuesday is Election Day. There is so much at stake, and we need everyone to chip in and do their part!

mikebraunforindiana.com [https://www.mikebraunforindiana.com/]

You're receiving this email because you subscribed via our web site [https://www.mikebraunforindiana.com/], or donated to our campaign

but you may unsubscribe https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-u-jjuhjrdy-kujulhlke-k/ if you're no longer interested.

Paid for by Mike Braun for Indiana

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Critical Election Day Input Required:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
THE FINAL 14 HOURS. |
---
| | | | | | | **[Authorized By Trump Headquarters](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=248d1cc22da8d505eac84378a124942edc6459aad4136a4af451c41154539fb6f3e2bc1bcdff7a1142c77d9bbee303bc1a564a19ceaf6c2c)**

Friend,

This is your **last chance** to help on our Election Day strategy that will determine who controls the people's House: _you or Nancy Pelosi._

I NEED you to **verify our voter-targeting models** by completing the Voter Target Survey RIGHT NOW.

**I will be taking off on Air Force One to go to _ANOTHER_ rally.** _While in the air, I will have time to be briefed on all responses submitted within the next 14 hours._ **[Voter Target Survey](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=248d1cc22da8d5052b2860d89537d9a7bd0b1784a74ae7ea45ee1f6901d755fc8eaa627877999b4aa583eade902d65768aa3742393252ac8)** **SUPPORTER:[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=248d1cc22da8d5056273dd9c3d7acfacb4e56b15304dd9ae19373de27d6f9ab5d0249aa4ddae484f81eaf2b735a7222d582bac93709f9405)
SURVEY ID: 6124335 - 2018
SURVEY RESPONSE: ****PENDING**
**DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT** **************[** Do you believe the caravan of illegal immigrants MUST be stopped?

⚪ Yes

⚪ No

⚪ No Opinion

⚪ Other, please specify:**](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=248d1cc22da8d5052c74fae0d2712afabdff892a56eb8e4e5c11256fb6acc368437b658c9fd0c19f4e0a61f69fc040d0103ea2dcc529d19e)************** ********[ TAKE THE SURVEY NOW](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=248d1cc22da8d505d87db64da0c7515a983b96fa837ff181182a84e6c5a9f78336d7faa57a16337b3083a37646f5cb5325c46c8bad3ba2da)******** _Attention: Please share your thoughts before 11:59 PM to be sure your answers are submitted on time:**[https://gop.com/voter-target-survey-2018](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=248d1cc22da8d505b6ff2015d618086f3f313f7daa1e88821bf34dbae52bfe22d5628461ce6858f48ab6bb9c46f862c74b4b7d3dbdfce793)**_ Since the day I rode down the escalator with Melania to announce my candidacy for President, I have told the consultants to GET LOST and instead have crafted my message straight from YOU -- the people.

Despite HATEFUL criticism from the media, our strategy has been working time and time again.

Our economy is booming. American unemployment is at its lowest since 1969. Coal, steel, and manufacturing jobs are coming back. Trade deals are being re-negotiated to the benefit of the American people. And we are fighting liberals to close our wide-open border.

But I'm not finished. **We still have a lot left to do until we can say that we _truly made America great again._**

Now I need your help with our Voter Target Survey today to make sure that we turn out the _our voters with the right message._

**[WITH ONLY 14 HOURS LEFT, please take my VOTER TARGET SURVEY before I take off on Air Force One.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=248d1cc22da8d5050238943945602af004ef5a2c0919b8f561a1fd11c656541f31807fc1d2dbac9a5d8cd1509a21ec942750ab7f9bb9ff0d)**

Thank you,

[](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=248d1cc22da8d505e30977ceef1d06dcf02a48c4656f00e7b3b57b3065aac920a252825d57a9a4f74e10b161f799c9451ab3cea57598cc88)
Donald J. Trump
President of the United States [TAKE THE SURVEY NOW](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=248d1cc22da8d505e69cc8799c9e3a33c3ad866d063854de8b3e0a52cb3f05d08561201c1b8d72e4d620b82b933fa198a82ae5733f00723c)

Peter,

**For the first time this election cycle, the leading political research group,[Cook Political Report](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/3027555/19948181/470692714?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzVjZWVlNC0wY2UxLWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hqCWPoqkLOuLm1F1nOf3C12HWbEi2vBTMFMMLa1RsyU=), has acknowledged the Texas 10th is no longer "safe" for the Republican Party! ** By moving this race from "solid Republican" to "likely Republican," Cook has placed us in the same category as many races that received national attention and support. **We just might be the underdog that shocks the nation tomorrow!** Of course, our team has felt good for a while now, given the great responses we are receiving across the nine counties of this District. **And we will be working non-stop for the next 34 hours to get out every single Texas voter.** **[Help us finish the job. We are still three thousand dollars short of our final fundraising goal. Please donate $20 or more today to make sure we finish strong.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/3027556/19948182/-2058851995?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzVjZWVlNC0wY2UxLWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hqCWPoqkLOuLm1F1nOf3C12HWbEi2vBTMFMMLa1RsyU=)** Thank you! name: Jeremy Ring
subject: It all comes down to tomorrow ☑️
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/sSL2XotHNIIEXZH_54XWF0Rg9oA402B_hoBon77KRnw=/iO-ImqyhRo7KtarqGVUgBbQnfK0CkYdfdA-1Yvw7Ifo=) Friends and Neighbors -- This campaign has been an incredible journey. From the Panhandle to the Everglades, I have traveled across our great state, meeting so many of you and talking about [**my vision for Florida, which is focused on an innovation driven economy ready made for the 21st century and vital checks and balances to our state and federal government. **](https://act.myngp.com/el/sSL2XotHNIIEXZH_54XWF0Rg9oA402B_hoBon77KRnw=/qFwfZziJTNGguOX4PW4aMsjQCPhK3U7o7eyKHL7DXiA=)

This is the vision I am ready to lead with as your next Chief Financial Officer (CFO). Now, after all the ads, debates and campaigning, it all comes down to **tomorrow - Election Day.** Now here comes the most important part of all - casting your **_VOTE!_**
**[Do you know where to vote, where your polling place is, or how you are getting there? Click here to confirm your polling location so you can make your plan to vote now! ](https://act.myngp.com/el/sSL2XotHNIIEXZH_54XWF0Rg9oA402B_hoBon77KRnw=/5pdbA5dHKlFFu9qewx8FD6O1f898kkFIVYIJHnghExg=)** [Let's send JR to the Cabinet. Vote tomorrow!](https://act.myngp.com/el/sSL2XotHNIIEXZH_54XWF0Rg9oA402B_hoBon77KRnw=/eug-MSTyjlsfuYMLnO4dHwoX1ysACn9kBEZaYEJieY8=?midqs=1Lysd31YHJdJWaZE1XsXsA==) As your next CFO, I will be an essential check and balance in the Cabinet, making sure you and your interests are the priority - and that _YOUR _hard earned money is being spent in the way you were promised it would be. I will take my experience from the tech world and the Legislature with me to the Cabinet, to help build and foster an innovation driven economy, ready made for the 21st Century. But I have an election to win first, _**tomorrow.**_ **And I can 't do it without you.** [**Can you help us win tomorrow - by making a plan to vote today? **](https://act.myngp.com/el/sSL2XotHNIIEXZH_54XWF0Rg9oA402B_hoBon77KRnw=/5pdbA5dHKlFFu9qewx8FD6O1f898kkFIVYIJHnghExg=) **Please share this e-mail with your family and friends.** Thank you so much for all of your support - **now, let 's win this thing!** **Jeremy Ring** | POLITICAL ADVERTISEMENT PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER

subject: Debate Victory & Newspaper Endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris DePizzo for Congress
body:
DePizzo For Congress Has Momentum Heading Into Election Day. | | | |
---
| | |
> > **Debate Victory & Newspaper Endorsement**
>> __DePizzo For Congress Has Momentum Heading Into Election Day.__
>
>> **DEBATE WIN**
>> Last Thursday, for the first time in 16 years, Rep. Tim Ryan took the debate stage and then was soundly beaten by Chris DePizzo. Don’t just take it from us...this is from Northeast Ohio’s weekend shows:
>
> “ _I thought DePizzo won that debate._ ” – Ron Verb, 570 WKBN Host
>
> “ _[Ryan] came off like a challenger, DePizzo had him on the ropes more than any other challenger ever has..._ ” – Justin Mitchell, WFMJ TV-21 News Manager/Editor
>
>> **TRIBUNE ENDORSEMENT**
>> Then on Sunday, the Warren Tribune Chronicle [endorsed](https://DePizzoforCongress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9c37c3735171f2d5686e3af5&id=fa46de33e4&e=6ad203e3e6) Chris DePizzo - the first challenger endorsement in 16 years - saying in part “..._we think our nation and our district will be better served with Chris DePizzo._ ”
>
> With roughly 24 hours until Election Day, DePizzo For Congress is working hard to get a win.
>
> Please forward this email to your family, friends, neighbors and colleagues in Northeast Ohio. And don’t forget to Vote!
>> #WeCanDoBetter
> _Help us build on this momentum today by donating to**DePizzo For Congress**!_

name: Dana Bye
subject: this weekend, we knocked on nearly 116,000 doors
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
If anyone doubted the grassroots strength powering this campaign -- well, this weekend proved them wrong. Our team of volunteers took Central Virginia by storm this weekend.
| | Peter, If anyone doubted the grassroots strength powering this campaign -- well, this weekend proved them wrong. **Our team of volunteers took Central Virginia by storm this weekend.** We completed 3,700+ volunteer shifts, knocked nearly 116,000 doors -- _yes, 116,000_ \-- and made more than 90,000 phone calls. We had meaningful, one-on-one conversations with the voters who will decide this race. And some special guests -- _including Gov. Ralph Northam, former members of Congress, and members of the Virginia State Senate and House of Delegates_ \-- made appearances, too. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/pMEL8DktylmlmIkylF87YbSGK8dZb5wvZc9WjPqnuQI=/e4kIaKHF8D-Jd7m_4t8VLXZ9bKm1LufeuFDSB6u-cyY=?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.05_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _Look at our packed headquarters!_ [**Chip in to our campaign today so we can keep up the pace today and tomorrow (and feed our volunteers!).**](https://act.myngp.com/el/pMEL8DktylmlmIkylF87YbSGK8dZb5wvZc9WjPqnuQI=/e4kIaKHF8D-Jd7m_4t8VLXZ9bKm1LufeuFDSB6u-cyY=?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.05_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) This race is a pure toss-up, Peter -- another poll confirmed it this weekend. We will win by harnessing this grassroots energy, but we are running a bit short of the resources we need to keep going strong. [**Can you make a donation right now to help us keep it up, so we can flip VA-7 and send Abigail to Congress?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/pMEL8DktylmlmIkylF87YbSGK8dZb5wvZc9WjPqnuQI=/e4kIaKHF8D-Jd7m_4t8VLXZ9bKm1LufeuFDSB6u-cyY=?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.05_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Thanks, Dana Bye _Campaign Manager, Spanberger for Congress_ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/pMEL8DktylmlmIkylF87YbSGK8dZb5wvZc9WjPqnuQI=/e4kIaKHF8D-Jd7m_4t8VLXZ9bKm1LufeuFDSB6u-cyY=?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.05_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/pMEL8DktylmlmIkylF87YbSGK8dZb5wvZc9WjPqnuQI=/e4kIaKHF8D-Jd7m_4t8VLXZ9bKm1LufeuFDSB6u-cyY=?refcode=footer&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/pMEL8DktylmlmIkylF87YbSGK8dZb5wvZc9WjPqnuQI=/lJ9VEh5Se1p6qb4Ai0IsdJ71yr2Phm6J1RGB8dzEGBI=)_

Our team of volunteers took Central Virginia by storm this weekend. | | Peter, If anyone doubted the grassroots strength powering this campaign -- well, this weekend proved them wrong. Our team of volunteers took Central Virginia by storm this weekend. We completed 3,700+ volunteer shifts, knocked nearly 116,000 doors -- yes, 116,000 \-- and made more than 90,000 phone calls. We had meaningful, one-on-one conversations with the voters who will decide this race. And some special guests -- including Gov. Ralph Northam, former members of Congress, and members of the Virginia State Senate and House of Delegates \-- made appearances, too. Look at our packed headquarters! This race is a pure toss-up, Peter -- another poll confirmed it this weekend. We will win by harnessing this grassroots energy, but we are running a bit short of the resources we need to keep going strong. Thanks, Dana Bye Campaign Manager, Spanberger for Congress Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit = | Paid for by Spanberger for Congress Spanberger for Congress PO Box 3121 Glen Allen VA 23058 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please =.

name: Bob Corney, Bredesen Campaign Manager
subject: Asking just one more time
body:
|
#
Peter -- Tonight is our the final grassroots fundraising deadline of our campaign, so in a moment, I’m going to ask you to chip in whatever you can to help us finish this race strong tomorrow. But first, I wanted to give you an update on where things stand on our race:
1. **The turnout for early voting in this midterm election was at historic levels.** We dwarfed total early turnout from the last midterm election, with turnout among 18-29 years olds up 767% compared to 2014.

2. **This race is CLOSE.** Election watchers and journalists all agree that Phil Bredesen is in a deadlock with Congresswoman Blackburn and that this race could still go either way.

3. **We still need to turn out more voters.** If we’re going to win this thing, we’ve still got to get tens of thousands of more Tennesseans to the polls TOMORROW.

Thanks to your help, we’ve been able to run this campaign the right way -- focusing on Tennesseans, bringing people together, and keeping Phil Bredesen’s message at the forefront of this race. And despite the more than $20 million in negative attacks from dark money groups against us, this race is still a tossup. But that means we still need all hands on deck tonight if we’re going to win this thing -- and that’s why I have to ask a final time: **Will you chip in $10 or whatever you can right now to help us finish this campaign and win tomorrow? Help from grassroots supporters like you could be the deciding factor in who wins or loses, so I don’t want you to miss your chance.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | ******[Chip in $10 Now »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/3030859/19972247/-1207524935?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2Q1Y2NiMi0xZGUxLWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QEQzcgsnfGEah4iAIYRA1TSVLXvz-a9h44YmIfkkMMI=&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em181105-last&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=)******

name: Team Kaine Reminder
subject: Need you to read this before tonight - takes less than a minute
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Derek, by this time tomorrow, polls will be open and voting will be well underway! Quick review of how you can help today and tomorrow: -------------------------------------------------
|
---
[ ](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10aa/3e0906/75574377/3e3771d6/1339660110/VEsH/ "https://www.timkaine.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=20181105_1_FR_TEAM_one-day-LDND&source=20181105_1_FR_TEAM_one-day-LDND")

| | Derek, by this time tomorrow, polls will be open and voting will be well underway!

**Quick review of how you can help today and tomorrow:**

-> If you plan on voting in person tomorrow (wherever you are!) please double, triple check your polling place, opening times (in Virginia that's 6 AM - 7 PM!), route to get there, and anything you need to bring with you so you have no excuse not to cast your ballot: [iwillvote.com](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10aa/3e0906/75574377/3e3771d5/1339660110/VEsE/ "https://iwillvote.com/va?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+iwillvotecom&utm_campaign=20181105_1_FR_TEAM_one-day-LDND&source=20181105_1_FR_TEAM_one-day-LDND"). | [**PREPARE TO VOTE**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10aa/3e0906/75574377/3e3771d4/1339660110/VEsF/ "https://iwillvote.com/va?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+PREPARE+TO+VOTE&utm_campaign=20181105_1_FR_TEAM_one-day-LDND&source=20181105_1_FR_TEAM_one-day-LDND")
---
-> If you, your friends, your family, your neighbors, _everyone you know_ , are all squared away on voting but you feel like there's still more to do -- you're right. [Send Tim Kaine and Virginia Democrats a donation so we can reach our goal of $40,000 and make sure everyone can get to the polls.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10aa/3e0906/75574377/3e37702b/1339660110/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-november?refcode=20181105_1_FR_TEAM_one-day-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+Send+Tim+Kaine+and+Virginia+Democrats+a+&utm_campaign=20181105_1_FR_TEAM_one-day-LDND&source=20181105_1_FR_TEAM_one-day-LDND")
[**FUND GOTV**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10aa/3e0906/75574377/3e37702a/1339660110/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-november?refcode=20181105_1_FR_TEAM_one-day-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+FUND+GOTV&utm_campaign=20181105_1_FR_TEAM_one-day-LDND&source=20181105_1_FR_TEAM_one-day-LDND")
---
We have thousands of volunteer drivers, poll watchers, and door-knockers set to go for tomorrow. Overseeing such a large operation takes a lot of work, organization, and resources to keep it moving. There's also still time to sign up [here](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10aa/3e0906/75574377/3e377029/1339660110/VEsA/ "https://timkaine.com/events?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=20181105_1_FR_TEAM_one-day-LDND&source=20181105_1_FR_TEAM_one-day-LDND") to volunteer if you haven't already.

**Getting involved this year is one of the most important things you can do for your family, your state, and your country. We 're so glad you're choosing not to sit this one out.**

[https://secure.timkaine.com/November](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10aa/3e0906/75574377/3e377028/1339660110/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-november?refcode=20181105_1_FR_TEAM_one-day-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=7+-+httpssecuretimkainecomNovember&utm_campaign=20181105_1_FR_TEAM_one-day-LDND&source=20181105_1_FR_TEAM_one-day-LDND")

Thanks and see you out there tomorrow!

_Team Kaine_

[**DONATE**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10aa/3e0906/75574377/3e37702f/1339660110/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-november?refcode=20181105_1_FR_TEAM_one-day-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=8+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20181105_1_FR_TEAM_one-day-LDND&source=20181105_1_FR_TEAM_one-day-LDND")

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address by [**clicking here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10aa/3e0906/75574377/3e377023/1339660110/VEsHBw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/update-your-information?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=12+-+clicking+here&utm_campaign=20181105_1_FR_TEAM_one-day-LDND&source=20181105_1_FR_TEAM_one-day-LDND")

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. However, if you'd prefer to receive fewer emails, you can [**click here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10aa/3e0906/75574377/3e377022/1339660110/VEsHBg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/less-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=13+-+click+here&utm_campaign=20181105_1_FR_TEAM_one-day-LDND&source=20181105_1_FR_TEAM_one-day-LDND")

Our campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. Your grassroots support is critical to re-electing Tim Kaine to the Senate. If you'd like to donate to our campaign, please [**click here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10aa/3e0906/75574377/3e377021/1339660110/VEsHAQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018?refcode=email_footer&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=14+-+click+here&utm_campaign=20181105_1_FR_TEAM_one-day-LDND&source=20181105_1_FR_TEAM_one-day-LDND") Thanks for having Tim's back!

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: I'm asking for your vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | Peter -- You may have heard me talk about the dignity of work. Here's what that means to me: It means investing in the people who drive this economy forward -- whether you punch a clock, collect tips, or earn a salary. In the Senate, I work hard every day to invest in Ohio workers, and to make sure that everyone has a fair shot to get ahead -- but to keep up that fight, I need your help. [**I 'm personally asking you to get to the polls and make your voice heard. If you've already voted, find five people -- co-workers, neighbors, friends -- and make sure they've voted, too.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd43/4462dc26/75f5df88/201f1c95/2097868350/VEsH/ "https://iwillvote.com/locate/?lang=en&state=OH") Whether you've been part of this team since day one or just gotten involved in the last few weeks, please know that I'm so thankful for everything you've put into this race. Together, we've built one of the strongest grassroots movements I've ever seen. And tomorrow, we have a chance to send a powerful message. But first, we have to vote. [**Make sure you 've got a plan to get to the polls (and to get five other people there, too.)**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd43/4462dc26/75f5df88/201f1c95/2097868350/VEsE/ "https://iwillvote.com/locate/?lang=en&state=OH") With gratitude, Sherrod

name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: PRAY. THINK. VOTE.
body:
Peter,
There are over 70,000 verified elections taking place across the country tomorrow.
The reality is that many of the decisions that happen in your statehouse or city council have immediate relevance to your daily life and community.
What if every person of faith voted? **90 million Christians in America have the opportunity tomorrow to bring faith into the ballot box and stand for biblical principles.** Imagine the number of lives that could be saved. Religious liberty would be upheld, and marriage and families protected.
Right now:
**Pray.** Pray for Christians to have God’s wisdom as they cast their votes tomorrow. Pray for Christians to take their sacred responsibility seriously and show up to the polls.
**Think.** Know about the candidates and ballot measures you’ll be voting on. If you haven’t already done your voting research, use the [Voting Assistance Center](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUNGKee3_hgG2DzKC9zCC90LnQIrJoQoXYqjFoj8SFKP3tlrJDu0ifiNHeUIf0jICpiUlNd39gAU-wibZNZPEOHxzO-eTvckuo0GPmVgtvIsL8B5dxeNKQD_bitsAT7EIw&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181105com01&n=1) to consult a [**Voter Guide**](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUNGKee3_hgG2DzKC9zCC90LnQIrJoQoXYqjFoj8SFKP3tlrJDu0ifiNHeUIf0jICpiUlNd39gAU-wibZNZPEOHxzO-eTvckuo0GPmVgtvIstVMKD-QATjjpRCs3DCgOig&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181105com01&n=2) to learn which candidates best represent your values.
**Vote.** Put your faith into action. [**Find your polling location**](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUNGKee3_hgG2DzKC9zCC90LnQIrJoQoXYqjFoj8SFKP3tlrJDu0ifiNHeUIf0jICpiUlNd39gAU-wibZNZPEOHxzO-eTvckuo0GPmVgtvIsghoIl0RETYUQ602ugeu8Bw&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181105com01&n=3) and go to the polls tomorrow! Encourage other Christians to do the same.
How you vote will determine the future of America and our inalienable rights. Let’s stand together.
**United. We Stand.**

Gov. Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181105com01&n=4)
©2018 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181105com01&n=5).

name: Trump Headquarters
subject: re: A Demand from the President
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
Everyone is on call. |
---
| | | | | | | **[Authorized By Trump Headquarters](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=272626615646df5074e88837deb3a163406f8630ad61b9fc252c347ead2191ba6bb499cd3366f6ecf930c74f9ce0f1ddf23cee75f12b6cef)**
---

Friend,

President Trump has demanded every HQ staffer to be on call at all hours of the night to make **last-minute investments** to turn out voters in each of these battleground districts. [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=272626615646df50ef363830e1ec9b26d243b147575110e3a01f01b20861eca9a656f478615e80478ad188f6af829271bf85c7c75ef67af9) (Real Clear Politics, 11/4/18) _**No one will stop working until the final polls close on the West Coast tomorrow.**_
---
|
**[Please make a LAST-MINUTE contribution of $5 to our Election Turnout Fund to help us stop Nancy Pelosi from buying up races all over the country.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=bf8226b95558f65e456285f7a5a0c4b15d89923053fea594ad33004e625267c7dba0e29e9ac9d0ad522a15fba0e66ac73ac9b310bdaf3833)** [CONTRIBUTE $20](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=bf8226b95558f65ed70435f6e764a48fbd9ae6acb9e096b244c2a8303840d7f95080e30d8385c73a3ba2acddffc6b88d594cc555a259bf7c) [CONTRIBUTE $15](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=bf8226b95558f65e49ae168fb33fe9334e550274ca506471e577bd5e144c636258ae3ad5f61dd12a331440d1541dd5183d00d12b12dbd27d) [CONTRIBUTE $10](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=bf8226b95558f65ecce10e072399260ab870bc9cc3aba578c1933e8013b755819b446649060b66a72046478162f2f162d156056a2469dabb) [CONTRIBUTE $5](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=bf8226b95558f65e2c5fb44ef175c0a4478da11ba4706975f29c07ed14f36b77db58823f630335a698ba38d4afb7e690794c3d11e1c19bd0) [CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=bf8226b95558f65e2012ca543f2babecbeb9a781980cfafc8a6dcd75945eb889bcfe1a5a65f63bf75b1e4581e0f434f2daa62f3b45f404e1)
President Trump is now being criticized by the media for getting home late at night after holding multiple rallies in one day.

**They 've just never seen a President work _this_ hard and REFUSE to keep a paycheck.**

President Trump promised you back in 2016 that he would be awake to take the 3:00 AM call.

Now you're seeing him in action. He will do whatever it takes to stop the radical Democrats from rising to power in 9 HOURS.

**We at Headquarters will need your help too.**

We need your support to turn out voters in every single one of the battleground districts shown above.

**[Please make a last-minute, game-changing contribution of $5 to turn out voters and stop Pelosi's blue wave.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=bf8226b95558f65e3bc8e95c9d64220e7baf931cb0b489fbeccd3f959b8efb4f77e5f188a17a7741f3af6809de851639a16c6cad2d4b6f83)**

Thank you,

Trump Headquarters

name: Josh Mahony
subject: Thank You, Friend
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP02/1/67524/images/MHNY_logo.jpg]

Friend,

Being the Democratic Nominee for Congress in Arkansas's 3rd District has been the honor of my lifetime. I have been so humbled by the support of so many people like you across Northwest Arkansas. When we began this journey, I knew it would not be easy and that it would be tough at times. But, knowing that working families, single mothers, small business owners, farmers and factory workers were not being represented in Washington, I had to do something.

I am proud of the campaign that you and I have built together. This race was run on people power, grassroots supporters like you have been with me from the beginning and together, we are shaping a better future for Arkansas families.

Tomorrow is the big day. I'm asking you to make sure you go vote, make a plan to do so, talk to your family and friends and encourage them to turnout.

Lastly, I want to say Thank You! I am grateful for every dollar that you contributed to this campaign, for every door that you knocked on behalf of this cause, for every phone call you made to fashion a better future for our communities in Northwest Arkansas. I will always be honored by your efforts in our shared mission of making our people more important than politics.

Sincerely,

Josh

If you believe you received this message in error, please unsubscribe to this list.

Mahony for Congress
P.O. Box 1884
Fayetteville, AR 72702
United States

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Indiana Republican Party
body:
The Right Track Results Tour wrapped up it's final stops this weekend. After 28 stops in 27 counties, Mike Braun, Governor Holcomb and our... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/on-the-road-right-track-results-tour?e=1acd9bb3d6)

| **Right Track Results Tour on the Road!**
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
| **Getting Out the Vote:
_30 Stops, 29 Counties, Thousands of Hoosiers_**
The Right Track Results Tour wrapped up it's final stops this weekend. After 30 stops in 29 counties, Mike Braun and our team of proven Republican leaders are on the road to victory this Tuesday!

**Thanks to every Hoosier who came out and joined us for rallies and meet & greet stops in EVERY corner of the state -- from Indianapolis to Mishawaka, from Jeffersonville to Lowell, from Muncie to Evansville, and from Richmond to Terre Haute.**

Hoosiers are fired up to vote on Tuesday to defeat Democrat Joe Donnelly, and replace him with Mike Braun -- the proven conservative outsider and businessman! Mike has delivered results in the real world and is ready to take his skills to serve Hoosiers in Washington.

**Check out more photos, videos, and updates from the Right Track Results Tour[here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a59d7f71fa&e=1acd9bb3d6), and read this great story about our Lowell stop in the Post Tribune: **
\--> [Holcomb says Braun is the partner Indiana needs in Washington](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1c7ed6d91f&e=1acd9bb3d6) <\--
And then get out and vote! Find your polling place at [Vote.gop](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=61e4b6bd23&e=1acd9bb3d6), make sure to cast your ballot for our Right Track Results team, and join us for our [Election Night Victory Celebration on Tuesday](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9273428819&e=1acd9bb3d6)!

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Indiana Republican Party
body:
Election Day is TOMORROW – and we need EVERYONE to vote! Tap or Click to find your polling location >>> | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/anderson-rally-with-mike-braun-congresswoman-brooks-467753?e=1acd9bb3d6)

| We’re less than 24 hours away from the polls being open. This election is going to be close – and we need every single person to vote.

We know that you have every intention of voting, but will you do us a favor? Please don’t vote alone. Take a friend, family member, co-worker, or neighbor with you. [_**Tap or click here to help them find their polling place.**_](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=400efe8a7e&e=1acd9bb3d6)

Here’s the bottom line: Democrat Joe Donnelly has proven that he’s wrong for Indiana. Mike Braun is the conservative leader who will fight alongside President Trump to get things done – he’s the right man for the job.

But in order to send him to Washington to replace Democrat Joe Donnelly, we have to vote for him.

[_**TAP or CLICK here to find your polling place.**_](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8c010d9c8a&e=1acd9bb3d6)

That’s all there is to it.

ON TO VICTORY!

Team IN GOP

name: Tina Smith
subject: Take the leap with me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
One thing keeps sticking in my mind.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-november?refcode=rtw_20181105-1_em&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Election Day is almost upon us, and in between visits to Action Centers and debates, and traveling around Minnesota, one thing keeps sticking in my mind. I always ask people who are out organizing, calling their neighbors, and knocking on doors why they do it? It's easier and more comfortable to stay home. People answer this question all different ways: I'm doing it for my kids. Because I know we are better than this. Because I can't stand to listen to one more negative TV ad telling us we should fear one another rather than lift one another up. But this was my favorite. A young person told me they had never gotten involved in any campaign before. So I asked, "Why now?" He said, "because I feel like it's my responsibility to have a positive impact on the arc of history." So if you are wondering how you fit into this election, think about this: Democracy only works if we participate. The polls close in about 35 hours, and there is still a lot to do. It may feel like a leap of faith, to get involved -- knock doors, make phone calls, donate -- but I urge you to take the leap. We need you, too, to have a positive impact on the arc of history. Thank you for everything you are doing, Tina | **What you do now will determine whether we send a true progressive to the U.S. Senate or just another rubber stamp for Trump. Please make a contribution to our final $40,000 goal of this election before midnight:** [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-november?refcode=rtw_20181105-1_em-biobox&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto")

name: Bob =?UTF-8?Q?Fertik=2C=20Democrats=2Ecom?=
subject: Tomorrow we hold Trump accountable
body:
Activist - Tomorrow is our last chance to flip the U.S. House of Representatives and put a real check on this lawless and dangerous administration. Voters in **all 50 states** have a Congressperson on your ballot, **so your vote counts**! Flipping the House will put Jerry Nadler in charge of the Judiciary Committee, Elijah Cummings leading the Oversight Committee, Maxine Waters chairing the Financial Services Committee, and Adam Schiff leading the Intelligence Committee. We could finally see real and meaningful investigations of massive corruption in the Trump administration. And it's not just about Washington DC. We can win back Governorships, state legislatures, town halls, judges, and prosecutors - who make crucial decisions about our healthcare, schools, environment, prisons, and guns. **[Spend two minutes with our amazing Progressive Voter Guide to see all the great Demoratic candidates on your ballot, and vote a straight Democratic ballot from top to bottom.](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/tRZ9B/6/Dy/r5cs/6fG9Mt/1dABa54QF/P/P)** Click this image from your phone's browser to load your Voter Guide on your phone and take it to the polls to help you vote for every office. [](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/tRZ9B/s/Dy/r5cs/6fG9Mt/75sgl6I7f/P/P) **Do you need a ride to the polls on Tuesday, or know someone who does?**
* **[Lyft](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/tRZ9B/v/DI/r5cs/6fG9Mt/sg7efU3FBk/P/P)** is offering 50% off on Election Day. Enter your zip code for the promo code.
* **[Uber](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/tRZ9B/z/DA/r5cs/6fG9Mt/vn7RYUcRZ1/P/P)** is offering $10 off a single ride to the polls on Election Day on the most affordable Uber option available in your city. Look for the Election Day code in your app on Election Day.
* **[Lime](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/tRZ9B/U/D4/r5cs/6fG9Mt/say7WIavTU/P/P)** is offering free rides in 100 cities on bikes, e-bikes, and e-scooters. Download the app and use code LIME2VOTE18.

**If you have any questions or problems during the voting process** , **call 866-OUR-VOTE** (866-687-8683). Then report the problem to **[Trust The Vote](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/tRZ9B/j/Dg/r5cs/6fG9Mt/gwg8CNCr8/P/P)** which is mapping all voting problems to look for patterns so local reporters can investigate them. After you vote, **[please spend an hour or two volunteering to turn out voters in your community](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/tRZ9B/5/0e/r5cs/6fG9Mt/6nsLxxrq4M/P/P).** [](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/tRZ9B/r/Dy/r5cs/6fG9Mt/6IUKcihXAg/P/P) Thank you for being a Blue Wave Voter. Let's win everywhere! Bob Fertik

---

If you wish to stop receiving our emails or change your subscription options, please [Manage Your Subscription](https://demolinks.us/u/OTg0MjAvMC8xOTM2Njk2LzAvNDQ5LzAvNmQyYjUzMWYyNDIzMDVlZjBlYTdjNDEyODZkMzM3MWUvMjc1NjYwMTM4)
Democrats.com, Box 1452, New York, NY 10276

name: Midterm Election Alert (via Team Pence)
subject: do you know what tomorrow is?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Pence Victory |

Tomorrow is Election Day. Polls are open 6:00 AM to 6:00 PM on Tuesday, November 6. Tomorrow’s election will determine the future of our country... _Tomorrow is Election Day._

**Polls are open 6:00 AM to 6:00 PM on Tuesday, November 6.**

Tomorrow’s election will determine the future of our country, and we need you to make your voice heard.

Make sure you **bring your government-issued photo ID** with you when you vote.

If you don’t know where to vote, you can visit this link to find your polling location here:
**[https://vote.gop/?utm_source=105996](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=7515b17cfffb45f3804d66f8f4b805b0&_e=JlhZA4mDfncWCi-FvAcMwf2-sPVQ9bBseVjvd_uBja_0USvSHbYNXI99gS_NBioIcc8sjn188Nfk4vBULCo15grX8fjPDGsrQmzUkAyKlAI2yBETmzdWUnfsnwghHclmrHt8SvO0bwkQaYyEu2HZ6IX4vhXMKKrx1zB2qaqQ-cFUMRC4TcVab8YsH-EOowr3Ne5Gmo2IuuUJF9jQTyv-aisM6osD7s6dZVdhOKMRGyjbIURv2NANeXQGy73fY7hguS7OIxXkGKy3JgqeWR_lSsclB3n3pn5MdcdPZ4bAO5s3x5_jmFRa9rM1Ekt4la1epGdeLqCFIakPH3Fmq9aoJO01kkx_rUsRDbsbpKq2dLg%3D)**

Peter,

This is it! Everything is trending the right way, but to win this race we need a massive turnout on Election Day. Join us! **1. Help us in person**. We will be knocking doors, making calls, and sending texts all day. We will also go to polling places to meet the voters. Connect with our team to get involved!
* Travis County: Come by our office at 5460 Guadalupe in Austin (8am-6pm) or contact Briana at 512-947-3270 or briana@siegelfortexas.org.
* Bastrop and Lee counties: Contact Ben at 512-791-8691 or ben@siegelfortexas.org.
* Fayette, Colorado, Austin, and Washington counties: Contact Andrew at 508-333-6457 or andrew@siegelfortexas.org.
* Waller and Harris counties: Contact Jacob at 713-906-6224 or jacob@siegelfortexas.org.

**2. Help us from wherever you are**. You can call or text from home! Contact Andrew to get set up: 508-333-6457 or andrew@siegelfortexas.org. **3. Follow or join my tour of the Texas 10th. **I will be stopping in six counties during the day to boost our get-out-the-vote efforts. Feel free to join us, or [look for live broadcasts on our Facebook page](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/3033876/19995321/1351707366?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODE2OTQ2ZS0zNWUxLWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YyaLHbpzvHu3RWxNQ1WeB4AVecbzyc-jlw2bEVqrwko=). * [7:00am in Cypress](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/3033878/19995341/1411902379?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODE2OTQ2ZS0zNWUxLWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YyaLHbpzvHu3RWxNQ1WeB4AVecbzyc-jlw2bEVqrwko=)! * 10:00am at Prairie View A&M! March to the polls starting at University College, 505 Anne Preston Street, Prairie View.
* 12:00pm in Sealy! W. E. Hill Community Center, 100 Main Street, Sealy.
* 1:00pm in Columbus! Colorado County Services Facility, 305 Radio Lane, Columbus.
* 2:00pm in La Grange! City Hall, 155 E Colorado Street, La Grange.
* [3:30pm in Bastrop](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/3033880/19995343/1065416613?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODE2OTQ2ZS0zNWUxLWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YyaLHbpzvHu3RWxNQ1WeB4AVecbzyc-jlw2bEVqrwko=)! * [6:30pm in Austin](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/3033881/19995345/73216538?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODE2OTQ2ZS0zNWUxLWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YyaLHbpzvHu3RWxNQ1WeB4AVecbzyc-jlw2bEVqrwko=)! We're having fun and have a great chance to win! See you soon,
Mike

Peter -- Have some time to spare today or tomorrow to help elect Phil Bredesen to the U.S. Senate? Right now from the comfort of your own home, you can make calls to help us make sure Tennesseans are ready to vote. [**Sign up here to let us know you have time to spare to make a few phone calls for Phil. name: staff@maggiehassan.com
subject: re. Heidi Heitkamp's note
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there, wanted to check in. Campaign experts say that losing in North Dakota could eliminate our best chance to take back a Democratic Senate, so we have to ask:
Election Day is tomorrow, so we have to ask: Are you doing everything you can to stand with Senator Heidi Heitkamp? Here's the link to give: [**https://hassan.bsd.net/Protect-Heidi-Heitkamp**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc13d/2a380d31/3706e8b3/f17d3e/3636958195/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibXdoNGhlaWRpIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxODExMDVfMTEwNE1XSDRISC1ISDEta2ljay1SU182bW8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mwh4heidi?refcode=e20181105_1104MWH4HH-HH1-kick-RS_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
Thanks so much -- your help in these last few days could be the thing that wins or loses this critical race.
-- Team Maggie
_\--------------------Original Message from Heidi Heitkamp--------------------_
**Team --** **POLITICO says losing in North Dakota would virtually throw away our only chance to take back the Senate for Democrats. That's why 23 right-wing groups are spending $10.5 million to defeat me.**
They know how important our Democratic Senate seat is in the fight for Senate control. NBC even reports that the GOP sees this seat as its TOP takeover opportunity. So, for the next few days, we must do everything we can to prove them wrong and pull out a win here in North Dakota.
**What we do between now and the election will make a huge impact. Time is running out, and I'm counting on you, everyone:[Please, will you rush $3 or more right now - whatever you can spare - to win in North Dakota so we can take back the Senate for Democrats?](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc13d/2a380d31/3706e8b3/f17d3e/3636958195/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibXdoNGhlaWRpIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxODExMDVfMTEwNE1XSDRISC1ISDEta2ljay1SU182bW8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mwh4heidi?refcode=e20181105_1104MWH4HH-HH1-kick-RS_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")**

"" "" "" "" Thank you for coming through when it matters most. Heidi "" _

subject: We can win, but we need to keep all of our last-minute ads on the air. Can you rush a $3 donation to Beto now to do just that?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

The latest poll shows Beto and Cruz tied, 49% - 49%. Political experts are
starting to say this could be an upset in the making. Youth voter turnout
has surged more than 500%, and new voters voted early in record numbers.

Beto can win. But we need to keep all of our last-minute advertising on
the air. And that’s going to take us hitting our $3.5 million fundraising
goal. Unfortunately, it looks like we aren’t going to hit our goal unless
we have a big surge today.

Can Beto count on you to donate now?
Hitting our goal could mean the difference between victory and defeat for
us on Tuesday.

subject: tomorrow -- what's your plan?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e7f86/51dbcc2a/152f0acc/3ac851d/3086515781/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/")
I'd like to ask for your vote, team.

Tomorrow, we have the opportunity to elect Democrats up and down the ballot. I'm so grateful for all of the time and energy invested in this campaign and other Democratic campaigns across the Commonwealth.

Tonight, take a minute to confirm your polling location, pick a time, and ask a few people to join you at the polls. You can visit **_[padems.com/vote](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e7f86/51dbcc2a/152f0acc/3ac851e/3086515781/VEsE/ "https://www.padems.com/vote/")_** for everything you need to cast your ballot.

Tomorrow, we have the chance to change the status quo for middle-class families across our nation. Let's not let this opportunity pass us by.

Thank you, as always, for your continued support. I'll see you at the polls!

Bob

| Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc.
