name: Peggy Flanagan
subject: Your vote, your voice
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor |
body:
#outlook a{padding:0;} .ReadMsgBody{width:100%;} .ExternalClass{width:100%;} .ExternalClass, .ExternalClass p, .ExternalClass span, .ExternalClass font, .ExternalClass td, .ExternalClass div {line-height: 100%;} body, table, td, a{-webkit-text-size-adjust:100%; -ms-text-size-adjust:100%;} table, td{mso-table-lspace:0pt; mso-table-rspace:0pt;} img{-ms-interpolation-mode:bicubic;} s body{margin:0; padding:0;} img{border:0; height:auto; line-height:100%; outline:none; text-decoration:none;} body{height:100% !important; margin:0; padding:0; width:100% !important;} .appleBody a {color:#68440a; text-decoration: none;} .appleFooter a {color:#999999; text-decoration: none;} body,#bodyTable,#bodyCell{ height:100% !important; margin:0; padding:0; width:100% !important; } table[id=main]{width:700px;} @media only screen and (min-width: 481px) and (max-width: 599px) { img[class=featured]{max-width: 80%;} table[id=featured]{width:80%;} table[id=main]{width:100%;} table[id=callout]{width:50%;} img[class=callout]{max-width:100%;} table[id=unsubscribe]{width:100%;} table[id=paidfor]{width:95%;} table[id=teaser]{width:95%;} } @media only screen and (max-width: 480px) { body,table,td,p,a,li,blockquote{ -webkit-text-size-adjust: 105%; } img[class=button]{max-width: 100%;} table[id=button]{width:100%;} img[class=featured]{max-width: 100%;} table[id=featured]{width:100%;} table[id=main]{width:100%;} table[id=callout]{width:50%;} img[class=callout]{max-width:100%;} table[id=unsubscribe]{width:100%;} table[id=paidfor]{width:95%;} table[id=teaser]{width:95%;} }

Friend:

I'm writing simply to ask for your vote on Tuesday, November 6.

For the past 13 months, Tim Walz and I have traveled to every corner of this state -- and we’ve been inspired by the enduring hope of our fellow Minnesotans.

Our opponents have focused on division and fear. They’ve been trying to tell folks who is in and who is out. They’ve tried to tell people who is deserving and who isn’t.

We’ve focused on a different message - a message of One Minnesota.

Growing up, I was the kid with the different-colored lunch ticket, because we needed those free meals at school. Medicaid saved my life, and as a kid with asthma, it’s the reason I’m alive today.

We all have a struggle; even if we don’t all have a champion.

And that’s why I’ve spent my life fighting for children and families that need a little extra help.

Tim is the Governor we need – a leader, a teacher, a veteran, and a coach. He’s proven he can win on tough issues in every corner of our state. I’ve seen how he relates to my daughter – and I know he cares for every child in Minnesota.

We’re running because we still believe it is possible to bring people together to take on our toughest challenges.

And when you elect Tim Walz and me to lead our state, we’ll hold the door wide open for every Minnesotan to build a better life.

That’s a vision of One Minnesota worth fighting for.

I’m asking for your vote for Tim and me. Stand with us as we stand with you.

Miigwech. Thank you.

- Peggy

P.S. Click here, and make your plan to vote >>

DONATE

--------------------------------------------------------
| Prepared and paid for by Tim Walz for Governor |
--------------------------------------------------------

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please https://act.myngp.com/el/x2bGA-A3uTsOvcCaHgOXZRoJEmHfcFx8XtSySpIKYYU=/8c-zVg09CAk3NSJfAJc8NLT0jo8NuWAPw_SdCOSd0F8=.

Tim Walz for Governor
P.O. Box 3205
Mankato MN 56002 United States

body:

**Friend, Claire McCaskill's Senate race is a TOSS-UP!
**
Victory will come down to just a handful of votes, so our field teams are still out knocking on doors and calling every last voter.

**But we can't do this without you, Friend! We need you to make a plan to vote and make sure your friends and family get to the polls tomorrow.
**
**[Click here to find your polling place- and then show up between 6 a.m. and 7 p.m. tomorrow to protect Missouri's Democratic Senate seat!](http://wfc2.wiredforchange.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=ofiDru69zfLr4oye3SbjXvuCexpfrz%2Fo&url=https%3A%2F%2Fshowmevotes.civicengine.com%2F)**

The next 24 hours will decide whether we win or lose. **We're counting on you to text three friends right now reminding them to vote tomorrow.** Your three texts could be the difference in protecting Missouri's Democratic Senate seat.

| | [Find Your Polling Place](http://wfc2.wiredforchange.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=uvjXVPuK79ut6MS3dX13wfuCexpfrz%2Fo&url=https%3A%2F%2Fshowmevotes.civicengine.com%2F)

subject: A quick question:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
Tomorrow's the big day...

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c3790eb/7ab0e2c4/7e750c9f/3499ad58/1626226858/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-fund-fight?refcode=OHQ11058Ab") Friend, Tomorrow's a huge day -- it's time Ben made history in Maryland by becoming the first black governor of this state. We know a lot of folks here in Maryland have early voted -- in fact, _**record numbers**_ of folks have early voted. But to power the blue wave, we need every single person to vote. Our team is trying to pull together the numbers to figure out where we stand with just ONE day left. Will you help us learn the status of the blue wave by letting us know if you've voted already, or are planning to vote tomorrow? | [I EARLY VOTED!](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c3790eb/7ab0e2c4/7e750c9f/3499ad5b/1626226858/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-early-voter?refcode=OHQ11058A")
---

---
Thanks for everything -- I can't wait to win tomorrow.
Travis

Campaign Manager
Ben Jealous for Governor

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Soaring Economy Should Be Celebrated by All
body:
| | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a0eb8e4102&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **_Soaring Economy Should Be Celebrated by All_**
“The economy is roaring,” the _Boston Herald_ editorial board writes on the heels of another expectations-beating jobs report from the Department of Labor on Friday. “We are seeing the best wage growth since 2009, when we were crawling out of the recession. In October, 250,000 jobs were added to the economy. The unemployment rate held at 3.7 percent — its lowest level since 1969.” In the words of former Vice President Joe Biden economic adviser Jared Bernstein, “Pretty much everything you could want in a monthly jobs report.” [Click here to continue reading.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ff0205b228&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Democrats [are] supporting a major new energy tax — but won’t talk about it unless they have the presidency and Congress,” House Majority Whip Steve Scalise and Americans for Tax Reform President Grover Norquist write in the _[Washington Examiner](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a168dd0fda&e=3ee4985eea)_. On the other side, President Trump and Republicans firmly oppose any “efforts to increase the cost of energy through taxes or regulations.”
---
|
---
| “When President Trump ended U.S. participation in the Iran nuclear deal, he promised tough sanctions on the Iranian regime. On Monday our administration will deliver exactly that,” Secretary of Energy Rick Perry writes in _[The Wall Street Journal.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d56ac94876&e=3ee4985eea)_ “The new sanctions will deliver an unmistakable message to Tehran: Change your ways or suffer the consequences.”
---
|
---
| The Trump Administration “has taken several vital steps to reorient the federal bureaucracy toward the chronically ill and individuals with pre-existing conditions,” Mary Vought writes in the _[New York Post](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=dadcb75173&e=3ee4985eea)_. Those steps include expanding access to both lifesaving prescription drugs and healthcare coverage options.
---
|
---
| “Over 2.1 million jobs have been created” since President Trump signed the Tax Cuts and Jobs Act just before Christmas Day 2017, Rep. Brad Wenstrup (R-OH) writes in the _[Cincinnati Enquirer.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8e1e5af37f&e=3ee4985eea)_ “It gave a much-needed tax break to Americans at every income level, helped create jobs for those who were previously on the sidelines of economic progress, and increased pay for hourly workers who need it most.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2b97c1ca2e&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f882aaddc8&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=48ad242913)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Tori Taylor
subject: open this. please.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
I tried to come up with a clever subject line to get you to open this email. Really, I did. But I figured straight-forward was a better way to go. Here's the thing: We're 19 hours from the polls open
|
---

| | I tried to come up with a clever subject line to get you to open this email. Really, I did. But I figured straight-forward was a better way to go. Here's the thing: **We're 19 hours from the polls opening.** We need $3,000 more dollars to fill the GOTV Fund. [**Can you give?**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427ada/e3b7d3/5e0ca93c/25556a4d/1179654079/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme181105am?refcode=kme181105am_m") | | | [Donate](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427ada/e3b7d3/5e0ca93c/25556a4d/1179654079/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme181105am?refcode=kme181105am_m")
---
It' almost hard to believe the election is here. We've come a long, long way. We made this race a toss-up. We spread Kathy's message all over the district, and it worked.
The other side is running scared. Special interests are spending thousands of dollars a day attacking Kathy. President Trump himself has been here (twice!) campaigning for Congressman Budd and attacking Kathy.
If for some reason you were holding back, you didn't want to give until the time was right -- **this is the time.[Give what you can, whatever amount that is, and help us get to this goal.](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427ada/e3b7d3/5e0ca93c/25556a4d/1179654079/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme181105am?refcode=kme181105am_m")**
Thanks!
Tori

|
---
| | Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Look at this, Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Our final deadline before Election Day is Wednesday.
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/12039e9/2fde7c66/49c76a55/15686ccf/3631098116/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/edayfinal?refcode=20181105_edayfinal_rc")
---
The stakes couldn't be higher, Friend.

We've been saying it for a while now -- tomorrow's election could decide North Carolina's future for a long, long time. Now, it's not just us saying it. Look at the headline of this article in _The Atlantic:_ _[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/12039e9/2fde7c66/49c76a55/15686ccf/3631098116/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/edayfinal?refcode=20181105_edayfinal_rc")_ The stakes really are this high. We just got through an amazing Early Vote period -- now it all comes down to tomorrow. **Can I count on you to chip in one final time to help us Break the Majority and defeat these dangerous constitutional amendments?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Chip in $5 ->](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/12039e9/2fde7c66/49c76a55/15686cce/3631098116/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiI1In0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/edayfinal?refcode=20181105_edayfinal_rc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&express_lane=true&amount=5")

We have the power to fundamentally change North Carolina for future generations.

We recruited great candidates across this state who are running because they want an education system where our educators are paid a fair wage and our students get the quality education they deserve.

Our candidates want to expand Medicaid in North Carolina -- because it's not only the right thing to do, it's the smart thing to do.

Our candidates want to make it easier to register and vote, not harder.

Our candidates want a North Carolina that works for everyone -- not just the super wealthy and the corporations.

[**It all comes down to tomorrow, Friend. Chip in if you're in.**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/12039e9/2fde7c66/49c76a55/15686ccf/3631098116/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/edayfinal?refcode=20181105_edayfinal_rc")
Thanks for all you continue to do for our state, let's go out and get this done tomorrow.

Roy

name: Chris Evans, betofortexas.com
subject: A “nail biter” -- The Dallas Morning News
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

The front page of the Dallas Morning News just called our race a “nail
biter” -- and with good reason. The finish line is nearly here. The poll
margins have narrowed from Beto down by 5, to 4, to 3... to zero!

Beto is TIED with Ted Cruz according to the last poll. Electing Beto on
November 6 is absolutely possible if we mobilize every ounce of our
grassroots muscle now. There’s no second chance.

We’re hustling hard to make our very last ads and voter contact pushes
massive enough to pull ahead. But we need more resources to pull it off.
To match all the PAC money that’s propping up Cruz. This is a huge moment.
And we can’t afford to fall short.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181105&t=1019&akid=24253%2E444211%2Ef3f4En ]We have less than two days to meet the only fundraising goal left in
this race. Making sure enough Texans vote for Beto on Election Day depends
on us covering the costs for our ads and organizing needs. Can Beto count
on you to contribute
$3,
or whatever you can afford, to help us meet our goal and win this
nail-biter?

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181105&t=1020&akid=24253%2E444211%2Ef3f4En ]Contribute
$3
»

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181105&t=1021&akid=24253%2E444211%2Ef3f4En ]Beto for Texas

Thanks to your contributions, we’ve accomplished amazing things. The
largest grassroots campaign in the nation. The biggest voter contact
mobilization in the history of Texas. A no-PAC campaign TIED with Ted
Cruz.

And it’s working: More voters are turning out than ever before. From what
we know about the kind of voters who’ve already cast their ballots,
results look promising for Beto.

But the outcome of this race depends on Election Day turnout. It’s exactly
why the media says it’s a nail-biter. And that’s why meeting our
fundraising goal to make sure millions more voters hear Beto’s positive
message via ads and direct conversations with fellow Texans is so crucial.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181105&t=1022&akid=24253%2E444211%2Ef3f4En ]This grassroots network has come through for Beto every time so far.
Can he count on you one more time? If you can afford it, please pitch in
whatever you can.

We’re under 40 hours until the election. We’re not slowing down. Let’s dig
a bit deeper in these final hours to make sure all of our work pays off.

Talk soon,

Chris Evans
Beto for Texas

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181105&t=1024&akid=24253%2E444211%2Ef3f4En ]Contribute
$3
»

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-email?refcode=em20181105footer&t=1025&akid=24253%2E444211%2Ef3f4En

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betofortexas.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=24253%2E444211%2Ef3f4En

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Gov. Holcomb: Braun is the Partner Indiana Needs in Washington
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Indiana Republican Party
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/gov-holcomb-braun-is-the-partner-indiana-needs-in-washington?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
| **ICYMI: Holcomb Says Braun is the Partner Indiana Needs in Washington**
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ee265a57f7&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **Check Out Coverage from the Right Track Results Tour! **
The Right Track Results Tour wrapped up this weekend -- and it's generating headlines across Indiana about the positive RESULTS Hoosier Republicans are delivering from the Courthouse, Statehouse and all the way to the White House! Check out this [great story](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=12e6b8b5cc&e=1acd9bb3d6)[ that ran this weekend in the Post Tribune](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=435302ca8a&e=1acd9bb3d6) about our Right Track Results stop in Lowell:

---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7baa2cd9b6&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **Lowell rally: Holcomb says Braun is the partner Indiana needs in Washington**
_Indiana’s governor said Indiana is on the right track, and that Mike Braun is the person Hoosiers need to send to Washington._ _An energetic Republican crowd packed the barn Saturday at Niemeyer Auction Services and Realty in Lowell to welcome Senate candidate Braun, Gov. Eric Holcomb and the state Republican slate ahead of Tuesday’s general election._ _The group ran into the barn from their Right Track Results tour bus into the crowd amid raucous cheers and high fives. The Lake County stop was the sixth and final for the day that started in Orange County and made its way up Interstate 65 for stops in Johnson, Marion, Boone, Tippecanoe counties before wrapping up in Lowell._ _“Lake County has never looked so good,” Holcomb said, to cheers._ _The governor touted Indiana’s fiscal success and hometown values as he talked about how the state has become a model for others._ _“We’ve been keeping the momentum going for quite some time growing opportunities,” Holcomb said._
**[\-- > READ THE FULL STORY -->](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=cac6b4564c&e=1acd9bb3d6)**
---

An energetic Republican crowd packed the barn Saturday at Niemeyer Auction Services and Realty in Lowell to welcome Senate candidate Braun, Gov. Eric Holcomb and the state Republican slate ahead of Tuesday’s general election. The group ran into the barn from their Right Track Results tour bus into the crowd amid raucous cheers and high fives. The Lake County stop was the sixth and final for the day that started in Orange County and made its way up Interstate 65 for stops in Johnson, Marion, Boone, Tippecanoe counties before wrapping up in Lowell. “Lake County has never looked so good,” Holcomb said, to cheers. The governor touted Indiana’s fiscal success and hometown values as he talked about how the state has become a model for others. “We’ve been keeping the momentum going for quite some time growing opportunities,” Holcomb said. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2018, All rights reserved. Paid for by Indiana Republican Party Authorized by Indiana Republican Party.

body:

Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first.

Team O'Halleran

name: Leah
subject: Tammy’s latest promise
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leah for Senate
body:
When Wisconsin voted for President Trump in 2016, we made it clear: we want more than the failed, progressive agenda of the Obama years.
****

Friend,

When Wisconsin voted for President Trump in 2016, we made it clear: we want more than the failed, progressive agenda of the Obama years.

But liberals like Tammy Baldwin didn’t listen.

She voted against Brett Kavanaugh’s confirmation last month, she voted against the tax cuts that are helping middle-class Wisconsinites, she wants government to take over our health care and eliminate private insurance, and she’s said that funding for a border wall is a “poison pill.”

And now Tammy Baldwin and her radical allies are aiming to impeach President Trump if liberals gain one inch in the House and Senate.

Put frankly, Tammy Baldwin is taking a hard stance siding with her liberal friends against Wisconsin voters.

It's unacceptable!

**[CHIP IN $25 TO DEFEAT TAMMY](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=d9ec842e63df4fd39304f5e263e70336&_e=Arm8PW1BoZ0ckmTRM79TTa6r9EiaDbr5M6eZdJdlkY8f9P5Ehjq50Aym9TLx8SzxT4Uj7fxlV_SC-G818X6cMUM6JtaR7rwNydZn4kCJRr2olZe677VfVhQ59G3DCW9mS8hsYKErO3hmFl22gi2020wi_Pme-sEjoeYvuhQUFzhCbODhuhcXW6P-A_RyFp3YGen5-_3ErIHneuTHOs44ZfOZrI5xuxP9LAw83EnsOt4uNCDdvtj_W1yd4X-R4EaOgIY5wtjc-w2rLQqczTSFpbi6UV2PqRAVn3HaWM4_4_UQcr3i3oFm4L7ygIUFlSiw9rgmontW_J9nWefdXHei5gHUiaURdNB33pVe1eVo3V-87TmrcknN73a2UDIuxnz8wtDnZBECis8XQktVQzkHaib4BtmnLp4MLKhwd6Pzn8SKikKn9mcSOWlVKmOcevTH)**

** **
Friend, Tammy Baldwin's priorities have never been more clear. She'd rather stand with extremists in the “resistance” who are determined to destroy our America First agenda than stand with the people of Wisconsin.

I’m standing to defend our strong leaders like President Trump – and I hope you’ll stand with me by helping me DEFEAT TAMMY BALDWIN this November.

If you can, please chip in now: [**secure.anedot.com/leah/donate/**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=d9ec842e63df4fd39304f5e263e70336&_e=dat1YLjHgu7Z_9ltMFEPJO8h7qFZZAyg6UeEJ8kAJqpzzad0bz_ndTGEJy64KfDb3LpxxBZ78oXpc9sqVLVR8aRcIxrcc6nWe45IJy6YEOqeT-SKZ7TdwDBIhhNlUbenp78JzUkuqizNUBiaKS2chW6d7RA0K1-zDma9zDLgwW_6Ej6Av2IajAF_Ouy1uAHCFWcaf2fBgB-7KWfI4RjBB92S9SaOLgW32jk1GtDlbenXScuIj9rsQG48zpYzXhxYWVCU4RUjIXuxPP-RZ7gIx_6KIyCUMdmZBiL_BzSgvJ30kS296xZt248EvUH0TJRXI_FjGTWneNyHAqkR4UhoF3YwYxWS3z57UZ_Anl-W8bUB9OuQuLV0UcDtuYAv5Np5Iu397vLuZDekaT89dNcMeecy2jckhrNhTKIjhKLkXao%3D)

It’s time to send Tammy Baldwin home.

**[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=d9ec842e63df4fd39304f5e263e70336&_e=Arm8PW1BoZ0ckmTRM79TTYz1oI1-SEiMEM1gtFR6lF6lXh6qIw7eHKR13Qv4G7n0ueqa8OFdv9lrNvgVv2xrpvJf1SBy-XwuwxTXn6ukhzp7g8RihaNQ2HI2QF1JBxRCUHFlbO6mwcBm2rT3BgQGIr8AXYxpeM-5FLsq2wCEFkpl2eaaPpnoOMDYFU5pju4rjWenEOJT8VE-hZpv-WyG_zsmRkUes_T2pqJNR2Qia8ESPdDLO835HJD_TqZmPrlbGzVbNeUB0VbwpT37vsB0sg%3D%3D) [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=d9ec842e63df4fd39304f5e263e70336&_e=Arm8PW1BoZ0ckmTRM79TTbyVFTqdyOCu9_SDISYKahWFMqUooekCe6iL7gxqKSSBVQvjio4yscS6FNh0T9S5fFm5BjALJqHamrvB05G9dru5V46yNIs8EBOLQXl1VWJPVbhuh7npKsFLw-PVe9pc_JVTDOR0qQqaom5ZnX9JI6BUejlKd6lThwSXErUDrmrkKwwqJmVq1UsEy3-Pz-N30Ua2kyrAH5z_ZXbra51EFXMjJVmSdaSWkOug6hgyUzZkCGxIakibOEjDXsEHRuktcg%3D%3D) **

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=d9ec842e63df4fd39304f5e263e70336&_e=_9EqdMd17ITFnHySCPn6ngQkboBupojdaUxE9CXc4dD_xYVr86f7jts5XtfvwyvW7uis5qFKaG96LB58ydb_IHEx4wneZq_-RxODUzYJQF-fr8gg8VlyoFANm7W2AjhR35pTcl_cI6hN9BQSKty_-89v5SEnfdWr71jGL-ypN65k6r7ZZD_aB0EwD0A0jwb1cf1un7azJdVKxaYUs9JPDC2kEztsnBmz-Z3ZSmBHyslUBksJuXIAS6mDgnJqJWYU). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=d9ec842e63df4fd39304f5e263e70336&_e=Arm8PW1BoZ0ckmTRM79TTaAAXiDpmWsMWGaveqLpceoXwvAfcgjqpOGLbhalOLBr8fMBf3RShNhxBVefk37d3gWyV2kfvaisZx5FJL1FnbeiQAGCuo5bpxPyhF1LHEm0bUfrvFSrr5uw2rNn092vc9A81wzus5EgjtqPQZ3vgmROkK2YPocCZ8vKDJV7MIXLjxOvC4LU-49M5e1fqn7daL2TSLchmh0T9dKPpCTTWa2VkcIkoCd7mQz1U3aabA4U2lqPrT4kqv0z3sth_Iv2c3MCuKk2VS1IDNj4qxhy0857FlbIP9U9_kgfa1wtIDUXxCTUEOg3FjPYCtBQNjr4sJdpPj0m20nrJxgGQS7c3UPoD5HV0_Trb1H78cUp5mtS) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=d9ec842e63df4fd39304f5e263e70336&_e=Arm8PW1BoZ0ckmTRM79TTaAAXiDpmWsMWGaveqLpceqikAdS6QY8WTXLWVx7wisCXcPCiFlBNycR0l4jATOqiO9KY7NtuhIg-JAsm5hlrH5m_26YLgbT63cozDwBQamF0DDEPVTchfjzrsIJtQ0iQWNY1u5w0sVL2A8eB--17Pn4436zM8iwokpbWfUjKwEMUJlVIpt_KCUW_L0U6q9DFL8QKdXXHFk07lkfayLwTY5jZkWK8-B7a5IqErUEHMfX_T3klkP0E-OER4yzqEV82kW-JVOIXBXz00k4FErm-pJUD79QiGx_5qRlqsxmYXknfPVWpLOqgMiDgx11TvqCUEZMtJVEbXUXQDI5wQdqYCZCVIWxmFkt-2-tpWKEvbIU) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=d9ec842e63df4fd39304f5e263e70336&_e=Arm8PW1BoZ0ckmTRM79TTYz1oI1-SEiMEM1gtFR6lF6lXh6qIw7eHKR13Qv4G7n0eVYeDMavII7jwSjbg3Zf1vd4hEvs7ES8AR_q0Vjcw9aIZshbin9rvGVeQUXce7I6J1eEJ6TMdy_aCGU7QK-nHiz_wO3VM_RwmPz1FEBhtRk-pLu0JJr_aNadk2FLAyiqIOPlFd6facd4CQJkxZebgE9GcnEy_hgpYQRb7_RETP0z_rDbz6ga964qLosM9yk-YG_dYzJSf1Egka_883P2Ag%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=d9ec842e63df4fd39304f5e263e70336&_e=Arm8PW1BoZ0ckmTRM79TTbyVFTqdyOCu9_SDISYKahWFMqUooekCe6iL7gxqKSSBxczs-uoZiEJGEyrQe7sB8yHlEdftT_vQE0myd_Jl_ps_12fVF6ETkiFb7BX3oRJahjeZjbouL2JpVPftXKeHhA-1D-IsKof_x_yzeM-1RR3VWcjBDH3qehI7YsIRbLbXzxTT-88O8jiDaMqkotyjGe6rPsOsIhlrwtJLDt3fv0GPedfKIw9fquaOytLBWK5AQ_J5J1-IVmUB77sRCrVoYw%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=d9ec842e63df4fd39304f5e263e70336&_e=Arm8PW1BoZ0ckmTRM79TTeXRF4S9vGw7KeaXnyuLKL6QBBCZVGBOvDZmD_Cq9DY0J2d3UX4wxnByPJzTPoOlUEIPm58Odka_N4SZQi6WuZi6wabTdzT-nhJ06zaqe3OQSE6kDjg72kFVrg3sVuVdvjorZGrXW0lHMAMMRkah2w0pbpwy1zjkp8MmzPh34vNenOd3ss0oioqCPl50EQ5NuEF1wRrp_A-q7sJxz9UOByz0Tfo_BsGpYm8S2wbSA88ZMRr_SfRZK9C2g9vmXOJOmw%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=d9ec842e63df4fd39304f5e263e70336&_e=Arm8PW1BoZ0ckmTRM79TTaAAXiDpmWsMWGaveqLpcerW_FpDzWT5xrhXGpryp5fV7QsAGR_B6gClhRF7YLIgxT739LcPg4vDsai_3kFt-ejFeVbNtPvOFnAzlS0VgkwBPdDkqQh9Tbdl5CV_ydyUggFAI_T1z9wL3MYLpRRG9qIS7dcoCiAmyXOT4sAeLcTKpSZa2i_iaGS9s_ivI7alvk1EgZmv02XSMvoOVfTPO3dsU7UTX0WQ3-M-PGwarG_km5_BU36Lr5HrGBghbSjCgiN8OOoVx-E7VlIORo8L0tblmZIUXsaj0aFnlVjCY9DcMUxZ492M63mO9bczynhjOVTpbeUVMnaj9Ihc_dFg3GgKTVN8BFx7qEeDpx5mzREdgPMf3j21jlLIh-HUMEAVbg%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. That’s how I keep my closest team members in the loop. Now if your tired of emails cluttering your inbox, I’ll be sad to see you go, but I understand. Click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=d9ec842e63df4fd39304f5e263e70336&_e=_9EqdMd17ITFnHySCPn6ngQkboBupojdaUxE9CXc4dD_xYVr86f7jts5XtfvwyvW7uis5qFKaG96LB58ydb_IHEx4wneZq_-RxODUzYJQF-fr8gg8VlyoFANm7W2AjhR35pTcl_cI6hN9BQSKty_-89v5SEnfdWr71jGL-ypN65k6r7ZZD_aB0EwD0A0jwb1cf1un7azJdVKxaYUs9JPDC2kEztsnBmz-Z3ZSmBHyslUBksJuXIAS6mDgnJqJWYU) to choose which updates you’d like to get, and click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=d9ec842e63df4fd39304f5e263e70336&_e=_9EqdMd17ITFnHySCPn6ngQkboBupojdaUxE9CXc4dD_xYVr86f7jts5XtfvwyvW7uis5qFKaG96LB58ydb_IHEx4wneZq_-RxODUzYJQF-fr8gg8VlyoFANm7W2AjhR35pTcl_cI6hN9BQSKty_-89v5SEnfdWr71jGL-ypN65k6r7ZZD_aB0EwD0A0jwb1cf1un7azJdVKxaYUs9JPDC2kEztsnBmz-Z3ZSmBHyslUBksJuXIAS6mDgnJqJWYU) to unsubscribe. clean_body: When Wisconsin voted for President Trump in 2016, we made it clear: we want more than the failed, progressive agenda of the Obama years. ** Friend, When Wisconsin voted for President Trump in 2016, we made it clear: we want more than the failed, progressive agenda of the Obama years. But liberals like Tammy Baldwin didn’t listen. She voted against Brett Kavanaugh’s confirmation last month, she voted against the tax cuts that are helping middle-class Wisconsinites, she wants government to take over our health care and eliminate private insurance, and she’s said that funding for a border wall is a “poison pill.” And now Tammy Baldwin and her radical allies are aiming to impeach President Trump if liberals gain one inch in the House and Senate. Put frankly, Tammy Baldwin is taking a hard stance siding with her liberal friends against Wisconsin voters. It's unacceptable! Friend, Tammy Baldwin's priorities have never been more clear. She'd rather stand with extremists in the “resistance” who are determined to destroy our America First agenda than stand with the people of Wisconsin. I’m standing to defend our strong leaders like President Trump – and I hope you’ll stand with me by helping me DEFEAT TAMMY BALDWIN this November. If you can, please chip in now: It’s time to send Tammy Baldwin home. Thanks, Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

name: =?UTF-8?Q?John_Bessler=2C_Amy=E2=80=99s_husband?=
subject: Minnesota Newspapers Endorse Amy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi,

As this campaign enters the final hours, there's a lot to be proud of. With the help of supporters like you, we've knocked on hundreds of thousands of doors, put up lawn signs across the state, and are turning Minnesotans out to vote.

But one of the things I'm most proud of is the support Amy has earned along the way -- from supporters like you and those that care about Minnesota. **Over the past few weeks, every major newspaper that has endorsed in this race has chosen Amy for U.S. Senate:**
* _The Duluth News Tribune_
* _The Star Tribune_
* _The Fargo Forum_ (and their 23 newspapers across Minnesota)

_The American, The Bemidji Pioneer, Brainerd Dispatch, The Tribune, Echo Journal, The Echo Press, Farmington Rosemount Independent Town Pages, Grand Forks Herald, Hancock Recorder, Hastings Star Gazette, Lake County News Chronicle, Morris Sun Tribune, Osakis Review, Park Rapids Enterprise, Perham Focus, The Pine Journal, Red Wing Republican Eagle, River Town Multimedia, South Washington County Bulletin, The Worthington Globe, Wadena Pioneer Journal, West Central Tribune, and Woodbury Bulletin_
* ECM Newspapers (and their 49 publications in cities across our state)

_Anoka County Shopper, Anoka County Union Herald, The Argus Shopper, Blaine-Spring Lake Park Life, Sun Current_(Bloomington)_, Sun Post_(Brooklyn Center)_, Sun Post_(Brooklyn Park)_, The Caledonia Argus, Carver County News, Champlin-Dayton Press, Sun Focus_(Columbia Heights-Fridley)_, Crow River News, Sun Post_(Crystal-Robbinsdale)_, The Dairyland Peach_(Sauk Centre)_, Dakota County Tribune, ECM Post Review_(North Branch)_, Sun Current_(Eden Prairie)_, Sun Current_(Edina)_, Sun Sailor_(Excelsior-Shorewood)_, Forest Lake Times, Life & Variety, Great River Life, Isanti County News, The Laker, Mille Lacs County Times _(Milaca)_, Sun Sailor_(Minnetonka-Hopkins)_, Monticello Times, Morrison County Record_(Little Falls)_, Sun Focus_(Mounds View-New Brighton)_, Crow River Life, Norwood Young America Times, Osseo-Maple Grove Press, The Pioneer, Sun Sailor_(Plymouth)_, Princeton Union Eagle, Sun Current_(Richfield)_, Sun Post_(New Hope-Golden Valley)_, Scotsman_(Cambridge)_, St. Croix Valley Peach_(Forest Lake)_, Sun Sailor_(St. Louis Park)_,__Star News_(Elk River)_, Stillwater Gazette, Stillwater ValleyLife, SUN Thisweek_(Apple Valley-Rosemount)_, SUN Thisweek_(Burnsville-Eagan)_, SUN Thisweek_(Farmington-Lakeville)_, Town & Country Shopper _(Princeton-Milaca)_, Waconia Patriot, Sun Sailor_(Wayzata-Orono-Long Lake)
* _The Winona Daily News_
* _The Fairmont Sentinel_
* _The Mesabi Daily News_

**[You can read all of Amy's endorsements on her website.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=9UXgS3yEPmVq42Iv1KPrfmejtys839d8)**

Amy has worked hard for Minnesota in the U.S. Senate, and to see that work be recognized by editorial boards across our state is a testament to the great job she's done for all of us.

**As we enter the final push, will you help share this news with your friends and family?
**
Thank you,

John Bessler
[**DONATE**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=1aXMlekPoNoWEfonqW8lrmejtys839d8)

name: Claire McCaskill
subject: I've never needed you more
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Team -- Election Day is tomorrow. The last pre-election polls are neck and neck, and **I have never needed you more.** Here's what you need to know:
* Far-right groups have spent more than **$50 million** to buy this seat for my extremist opponent.
* Every dollar from grassroots supporters like you will make a difference in the final hours of this tough race.
* We need to raise $10,000 by midnight to hit our _final fundraising goal_ of this campaign and keep our GOTV operations running until the very last ballot is cast tomorrow.

I'm fighting with everything I've got, every single minute, against the worst parts of President Trump's agenda. But there's so much at stake - and right now, we're falling short of what we need to win and nearly out of time to catch up. **We're running out of time to close the gap, and I can't do it without you:[Will you please give $3 or more right now to protect Missouri's Democratic Senate seat?](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc13b/2a380d31/34f20e63/f17df0/4236392785/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxOF9td2g0Y21jIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxODExMDVfTVdINENNQy1DTUNfNm1vIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2018_mwh4cmc?refcode=e20181105_MWH4CMC-CMC_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")**

clean_body: Team -- Election Day is tomorrow. The last pre-election polls are neck and neck, and I have never needed you more. Here's what you need to know: Far-right groups have spent more than $50 million to buy this seat for my extremist opponent. Every dollar from grassroots supporters like you will make a difference in the final hours of this tough race. We need to raise $10,000 by midnight to hit our final fundraising goal of this campaign and keep our GOTV operations running until the very last ballot is cast tomorrow. I'm fighting with everything I've got, every single minute, against the worst parts of President Trump's agenda. But there's so much at stake - and right now, we're falling short of what we need to win and nearly out of time to catch up. We're running out of time to close the gap, and I can't do it without you: "" If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will automatically be split between Claire McCaskill and Maggie Hassan. "" "" "" ""** Thank you so much for your support. With your help, I know we can win on Tuesday. Claire "" _

name: Tim Ryan
subject: 36 hours left -- can you make calls, send texts, or knock on doors?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
body:
What a Sunday! After rallying with Sherrod Brown, Rich Cordray, Betty Sutton, and all our great Ohio Democratic candidates, I went door-to-door in the 13th District to get out the vote. | |
---
Folks: What a Sunday! After rallying with Sherrod Brown, Rich Cordray, Betty Sutton, and all our great Democratic candidates, I went door-to-door in the 13th District to get out the vote. [Our governor's race is CLOSE, and I'm doing everything I can to make sure we win up and down the ballot on Tuesday. Join me -- can you knock on doors, send texts, or make calls?](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9089/5486deaa/2445f8e5/dcf7564/2108882362/VEsH/ "https://events.mobilizeamerica.io/ohdems/") [](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9089/5486deaa/2445f8e5/dcf7567/2108882362/VEsE/ "http://events.mobilizeamerica.io/ohdems/") [](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9089/5486deaa/2445f8e5/dcf7567/2108882362/VEsF/ "http://events.mobilizeamerica.io/ohdems/") [](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9089/5486deaa/2445f8e5/dcf7567/2108882362/VEsC/ "http://events.mobilizeamerica.io/ohdems/") If we want to improve access to health care, protect and expand workers' rights, and finally unrig our gerrymandered district map, **we need Rich and Betty in the governor's mansion.** And -- to stop undemocratic voter purges and end the years of eroding voting rights in Ohio, **we also need Kathleen Clyde as our next Secretary of State.**
[It all comes down to the next 36 hours -- can you take an hour or two to make calls, send texts, or knock on doors to get out the vote?](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9089/5486deaa/2445f8e5/dcf7567/2108882362/VEsD/ "http://events.mobilizeamerica.io/ohdems/") Thank you for all your support, \-- Tim [DONATE](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9089/5486deaa/2445f8e5/dcf7566/2108882362/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr_nov18?refcode=em20181105_canvass_oh13")

* * *
Update Email Preferences [Receive Fewer Emails](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9089/5486deaa/2445f8e5/dcf7569/2108882362/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timryanforcongress.com/page/signup/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") [ Unsubscribe](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9089/5486deaa/2445f8e5/dcf7568/2108882362/VEsO/ "http://action.timryanforcongress.com/unsubscribe")

# Meet Tim Ryan
Tim Ryan is a champion for working families in Ohio's 13th District and is known for challenging both parties to do more to rebuild the middle class. Tim believes that every hardworking family deserves a good job, a quality education for their kids, affordable healthcare, and the security of knowing they can retire with dignity. Tim was elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in 2002 and has been fighting for working people ever since.
| |
---

From Tim and all of us at Team Ryan, thank you!

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: every corner of Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
This race could be decided by one vote. |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa7e2/34a064cc/3b40e8f/70ce2e8/2585359430/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Friend: When we win this election tomorrow, it may be by one vote. This race is that close. We don't know if that vote will come from Damascus or Newington, Atlanta or Athens. It could be cast by your neighbor, or by a Georgian hundreds of miles away. **So that means we need to Get Out The Vote in every corner of Georgia.** I'm asking you, personally, to sign up to canvass on Election Day. I need volunteers knocking on doors in every community, in every city, on every street. _I need you._ Click here to sign up: **[VOLUNTEER](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa7e2/34a064cc/3b40e8f/70ce2e9/2585359430/VEsE/ "https://abrams.bsd.net/GOTVEvents")** Here's the truth: I can't do it alone. There are simply too many voters to reach out to, too many doors to knock. We're depending on volunteers to get this done, to use any time you have before work, during your lunch break, or throughout the day to help get out the vote. **[So please, sign up to knock on doors. And tomorrow after you've voted, sign up for one more shift. This is it.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa7e2/34a064cc/3b40e8f/70ce2e9/2585359430/VEsF/ "https://abrams.bsd.net/GOTVEvents")** Thank you for everything you do to support this campaign. All my best, Stacey Abrams

name: Keren
subject: Sick of this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Derek -- I am cautiously optimistic about tomorrow. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek -- I am cautiously optimistic about tomorrow.

I went to a vigil at a Virginia synagogue last week after the tragic shooting in Pittsburgh, and what I saw there gave me hope. In the face of such horror, fear, and sadness, I saw people coming together. Really, truly coming together in a way I haven't seen in a long time. **People are sick of this, and they 're not going to take it.**

They see Donald Trump building up a rhetoric of hate as if he's not accountable to anybody. But the truth is, we're all accountable to somebody. To our families, our neighborhoods, our faith, our communities. And Donald Trump? He's accountable to _us._

**So let 's show him that. Let's show him by taking back control -- we can take back the House, and even the Senate, if we just _push a little harder_ in these final 24 hours. Use this link from our finance team to make a final donation to hold Trump accountable:** [https://secure.timkaine.com/November](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1754/3e0906/7aa5e932/3e3773be/2471129054/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-november?refcode=20181105_2_FR_KCD_sick&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+httpssecuretimkainecomNovember&utm_campaign=20181105_2_FR_KCD_sick&source=20181105_2_FR_KCD_sick")

This is about more than just a candidate. It's about our country. Tomorrow we have a chance to change things. I want to tell Tim that his community of supporters came together and took a **major** stand in these last hours. Will you help me do that?

Thank you,

_Keren_
Campaign Manager, Tim Kaine | [**DONATE**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1754/3e0906/7aa5e932/3e3773bd/2471129054/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-november?refcode=20181105_2_FR_KCD_sick&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20181105_2_FR_KCD_sick&source=20181105_2_FR_KCD_sick")

name: NM Votes 2018
subject: polls open tomorrow!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | Friend,

Election Day is TOMORROW, and we're hitting the doors to make sure New Mexicans get out to the polls.

As one of our top supporters, we want to check in and make sure you'll be getting out to vote, too!

[**It 's vital you make a plan to vote now. Find out your polling information here so you can plan when you'll cast your ballot tomorrow ->**](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b4b1/43d8135f/65aab682/51018bdd/497792834/VEsH/ "http://www.sos.state.nm.us/Voter_Information/voter-information-portal.aspx?utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+Itrsquos+vital+you+make+a+plan+to+vote+n&utm_campaign=MH_EM_EN_90DO_181105_1_2&source=MH_EM_EN_90DO_181105_1_2&refcode=MH_EM_EN_90DO_181105_1_2")

We've been waiting two years to go to the polls and send a message to President Trump. Tomorrow is your chance to make your voice heard and turn New Mexico blue.

Find your polling information here: [**http://nm.martinheinrich.com/GO-VOTE**](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b4b1/43d8135f/65aab682/51018bdc/497792834/VEsE/ "http://www.sos.state.nm.us/Voter_Information/voter-information-portal.aspx?utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-++httpnmmartinheinrichcomGOVOTE&utm_campaign=MH_EM_EN_90DO_181105_1_2&source=MH_EM_EN_90DO_181105_1_2&refcode=MH_EM_EN_90DO_181105_1_2")

Thanks!

Team Martin Heinrich

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: re: No briefing from you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
About to walk onto the tarmac. The countdown begins. |
---
| | | | | | |

Friend -- I am just leaving a GREAT rally in Indiana. And now I'm taking off again to get back to work for you.

**While in the air, I will once again have time to review responses from our VOTER TARGET SURVEY submitted within the final hours.**

**[Please take our Voter Target Survey right now.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=056988bdfa7d1f15f55b3585b42d6de7435da86ce7d2621b8f11f504e431d4b40b2b2dc4a52b2cede83854141827fd53fa8f9cdc78e2bf60)**
**[Voter Target Survey](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=056988bdfa7d1f15d6ad8d76d3d09bdb32eb20b14ef427075f4f7b80712704fa01c962c5b270a1e5ba52d79ff714bf9e4ee0bc6c10b2e1fe)** **SUPPORTER:[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=056988bdfa7d1f150111d16f2b7d9d11ad591b838567e3a912e2cdadda266bbea4908cf8198057127378978243c43d90d065cb54c297c2c5)
SURVEY ID: 6124335 - 2018

⚪ Yes

⚪ No

⚪ Other, please specify:**](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=056988bdfa7d1f15be91bfc728b63fd43464195c5eaa4b9d826060998fc9d354f73a746b1d82c1268fbad0fb5267bf22028c5f7d8d90c824)************** ********[ TAKE THE SURVEY NOW](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=056988bdfa7d1f153f6d19f5f4354ec4ed27fce91b6e4a549a5b9f7f8d6de3bed3400ab8c597a93b95ef586470b9b402d086c90ea6fb04c6)******** _Attention: Please share your thoughts before 11:59 PM to be sure your answers are submitted on time:**[https://gop.com/voter-target-survey-2018](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=056988bdfa7d1f15cb0a535362e02c6e7f424de33dfe1dea9b16e06d7e2d2c2200ed78806b0a455a59e03705834945b780af6a184db21d6c)**_

Your responses will help all of our staffers turn out the right voters with the right message. You will also let me know what message is most important to deliver to voters during the final hours.

**[Please take my survey right now.>>](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=056988bdfa7d1f1508c8a9536fdf4d71ddd03ec404acb4d0c5bb9f3a9f390b4189a4a6fb65c4d77cf8133df2fb7481cf596717525f538a83)**

Thank you,

[](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=056988bdfa7d1f15384132332b2137cdb56e9874bae08bf03afa4746c20e44cc565d45480a887b806c3b1f81255ce7f75ac17fac27335c37)
Donald J. Trump
President of the United States [TAKE THE SURVEY NOW](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=056988bdfa7d1f15e27dcf57dbfb733a4c52dda9025c474b56a1b4a79619217b31426fd9f2159bb2049f1842a4b05e635c8c4ca43dd244ef)

**\--------- Forwarded Message ---------**
**From:** Donald J. Trump
**Subject:** Critical Election Day Input Required:
**To:[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=056988bdfa7d1f1569a60e80c254536bfdf4a305c1dad58c5a2b5de7debc17655d69ebc364a8d6efbb6b55422af14f6c36a32a0e03dc6974)**

---
**[Authorized By Trump Headquarters](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=056988bdfa7d1f15dd534cfba332eab36f10baf96d8b70e34ce4f12e1bc2b329116d63611cbe969aeb75f882efb3158a28ef996aeb53ca87)**

Friend,

This is your **last chance** to help on our Election Day strategy that will determine who controls the people's House: _you or Nancy Pelosi._

I NEED you to **verify our voter-targeting models** by completing the Voter Target Survey RIGHT NOW.

**I will be taking off on Air Force One to go to _ANOTHER_ rally.** _While in the air, I will have time to be briefed on all responses submitted within the next 14 hours._ **[Voter Target Survey](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=056988bdfa7d1f15d6ad8d76d3d09bdb32eb20b14ef427075f4f7b80712704fa01c962c5b270a1e5ba52d79ff714bf9e4ee0bc6c10b2e1fe)** **SUPPORTER:[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=056988bdfa7d1f150111d16f2b7d9d11ad591b838567e3a912e2cdadda266bbea4908cf8198057127378978243c43d90d065cb54c297c2c5)
SURVEY ID: 6124335 - 2018
SURVEY RESPONSE: ****PENDING**
**DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT** **************[** Do you believe the caravan of illegal immigrants MUST be stopped?

⚪ Yes

⚪ No

⚪ No Opinion

⚪ Other, please specify:**](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=056988bdfa7d1f15be91bfc728b63fd43464195c5eaa4b9d826060998fc9d354f73a746b1d82c1268fbad0fb5267bf22028c5f7d8d90c824)************** ********[ TAKE THE SURVEY NOW](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=056988bdfa7d1f153f6d19f5f4354ec4ed27fce91b6e4a549a5b9f7f8d6de3bed3400ab8c597a93b95ef586470b9b402d086c90ea6fb04c6)******** _Attention: Please share your thoughts before 11:59 PM to be sure your answers are submitted on time:**[https://gop.com/voter-target-survey-2018](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=056988bdfa7d1f15cb0a535362e02c6e7f424de33dfe1dea9b16e06d7e2d2c2200ed78806b0a455a59e03705834945b780af6a184db21d6c)**_ Since the day I rode down the escalator with Melania to announce my candidacy for President, I have told the consultants to GET LOST and instead have crafted my message straight from YOU -- the people.

Despite HATEFUL criticism from the media, our strategy has been working time and time again.

Our economy is booming. American unemployment is at its lowest since 1969. Coal, steel, and manufacturing jobs are coming back. Trade deals are being re-negotiated to the benefit of the American people. And we are fighting liberals to close our wide-open border.

But I'm not finished. **We still have a lot left to do until we can say that we _truly made America great again._**

Now I need your help with our Voter Target Survey today to make sure that we turn out the _our voters with the right message._

**[WITH ONLY 14 HOURS LEFT, please take my VOTER TARGET SURVEY before I take off on Air Force One.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=61522a292e5da25783a18febc51dae13be8e74f6035464aee06e146f5755675deea57b22e7dbc8693b3bd9038fc9d3a374c5dabe9ec710ee)**

Thank you,

[](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=056988bdfa7d1f15384132332b2137cdb56e9874bae08bf03afa4746c20e44cc565d45480a887b806c3b1f81255ce7f75ac17fac27335c37)
Donald J. Trump
President of the United States [TAKE THE SURVEY NOW](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=056988bdfa7d1f15e27dcf57dbfb733a4c52dda9025c474b56a1b4a79619217b31426fd9f2159bb2049f1842a4b05e635c8c4ca43dd244ef)

name: betofortexas.com
subject: They’re trying to measure our momentum
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

The eyes of the nation are on us right now -- Beto vs. Ted Cruz is the
race everyone is talking about, from reporters to the rest of the country.
They are watching to see if Texans will stand up on Tuesday and send an
unmistakable message about the future they want.

And right now, everyone is trying to pinpoint the level of our momentum.
That’s why news reporters and the Cruz campaign are watching our progress
on this fundraising goal closely. If we can close the gap and hit this
goal, it’ll send a big message about the strength of our campaign headed
into Election Day.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181105&t=1019&akid=24478%2E444211%2ECbtK1P ]We can’t afford to fall behind with everyone watching and counting on
us. Can you chip in a donation right
now towards our goal? If everyone gives a little bit, we can reach this
goal and shock the nation with a big win on Tuesday.

$3

name: Bailey Sexton, Political Director
subject: This is our last chance, Friend.
body:
Friend,

Election Day is **TOMORROW**. I'm so proud of how hard Josh has worked over the past year and a half. It's been such an incomparable pleasure to be along for the ride with him and the rest of our staff members. (Quite literally - we've driven to every corner of this district.) As your congressman, I know Josh will always put people like me and you first - but I know he can't do it without our help.
Tomorrow is your last chance to show up and work to elect Josh.
I'll make it simple **three step process** :
**1\. Show up:** come to our HQ (355 N College Ave, Fayetteville) and make calls to voters, knock some doors, or walk over to the courthouse with a sign. We will even keep you fed & hydrated!
**2\. Bring a friend: **Everything is better when you're doing it with someone you love, even participating in the democratic process!
**3**. **Pat yourself on the back:** Whether you're able to make it tomorrow or not, we want to thank you for everything you've done to support Josh. Whether financially, putting in elbow grease, or just telling your friends about us, you're making a huge difference and making a real impact in this district.
**When:** TOMORROW from 7:30 a.m. to 7:30 p.m.
**Where:** 355 N College Ave in Fayetteville
**Why:** Friend, I think we both know why.

Let me know if you can be there. Or, I mean, you could surprise me. I like surprises.
I can't wait to see you all tomorrow! Wish us luck!

Also, just because it's my personal tradition: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-qkf0fLU2Ao](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/3038435/20038359/-803653937?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzUyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjE4Y2IxOS01OWUxLWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C6uyi63g98tw6AVJuv-xuFvVNhl4KjKvk5uqpeDTW0Q=&v=-qkf0fLU2Ao)

Bailey
If you believe you received this message in error, please unsubscribe to this list.
Mahony for Congress
P.O. Box 1884
Fayetteville, AR 72702
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/5811864a-55e1-e811-8607-281878391efb/b218cb19-59e1-e811-8607-281878391efb?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzUyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjE4Y2IxOS01OWUxLWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C6uyi63g98tw6AVJuv-xuFvVNhl4KjKvk5uqpeDTW0Q=&id=110671788&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com).

subject: CA-48 is a ONE POINT race.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Committee to Re-Elect Linda Sanchez

name: Tim Walz
subject: I'm humbly asking
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
|
---

Friend:
Tomorrow is Election Day. I'm humbly asking for your vote.
I fundamentally believe that we can come together as One Minnesota to face our toughest challenges. We can recognize that when Mankato thrives, Minneapolis thrives. When Rondo thrives, the Range thrives. Instead of talking about what we can't do, we are going to focus on what we can do.
There's no doubt about it: we face some tremendous challenges in the coming years. But, when our state has faced equally big challenges in the past, we've always met them with a unique, innovative spirit that allowed us to lead the nation in finding solutions.
Part of the reason why Minnesota has created solutions is that we have a deep commitment to educating the next generation of problem-solvers. As a former classroom teacher, I've seen firsthand what students achieve when they have access to a great school. We need to keep our promise to our children by both investing in their schools and recognizing the inequities that hamper their potential.
We know that children don't come to school in pieces. A hungry child cannot learn, just as a homeless child has no home for completing homework. It's time for us to identify these inequities and then tackle them with research-proven solutions so that our entire future workforce - not just an exclusive few - can solve tomorrow's problems.
We must reaffirm the Minnesota value that health care is a basic human right. Minnesota can figure out how to deliver it more effectively, affordably, and get better results. We can ensure every Minnesotan has access to quality care at a price they can afford. But we won't stop there. We will invest in our cutting-edge research institutions in this state to ensure the cure for the world's most devastating diseases comes right through Minnesota.
We will find the opportunity in our challenges. Instead of burying our head in our hands when it comes to our changing climate, we will tackle it head on. We will protect our planet for generations to come. And we will do so in a way that creates good-paying jobs across our state. Minnesota can and will pioneer the Green Economy.
Unity is our tradition. Our ancestors - from the original Anishinaabe and Dakota people of this state to the immigrant farmers - carved out a life in the unforgiving north. And I've seen our ability to pull together firsthand as a soldier in the National Guard.
Because no matter how daunting the challenge; no matter how dark the times; I refuse to believe that Minnesota's best days are behind us. Our blood saved the Union at Gettysburg. Our iron forged the tanks that liberated Europe. Our farmers sparked a green revolution that fed the world. Our imagination transformed medicine. What many describe as the Minnesota Miracle, that's just what we do here.
We don't fear the future. We create it.
I'm humbly asking for your vote.
\- Tim

P.S. [**You can click here and make your plan to vote >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/soO9yYcTxyQ7OH9slwHckc7A35BVpob1leGobUS_heQ=/5G6TRiiTt6PfzfaA-yI3oRBC1kfMihXQbrmD6mgTJ5E=)

| ******[**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/soO9yYcTxyQ7OH9slwHckc7A35BVpob1leGobUS_heQ=/J1Z06eSsieNdmrlWXSwd77GCh1QtmXJSOoG9GAPr0Dg=)******
---
|

| Prepared and paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
---

Mankato MN 56002 United States

name: Jessica Morse
subject: A snowball’s chance in hell
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress, a grassroots campaign
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-ciUqGWXgZlTzSVNpqUSlnA8kCBnb-cBZ-jdIpsXIA0=/QY86CGT3k-8y00yXwC-3Fr5A0TxW103pEtF-buoF--I=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20181105_JM_20181105-jmfinal_all_logo)
Peter,
When I first started this campaign, someone told me, "I think you'd be great in Congress, but this race doesn't have a snowball's chance in hell." I grinned and replied, "Well, it snowed when I was in Baghdad, so I like my odds."
Now, on the eve of the election, victory is within our grasp.
**With your help, we have run a campaign built on inspiration rather than division. Every day, I meet people who are excited, empowered and energized. Our campaign has empowered communities, delivered a platform for innovative solutions, and dissolved superficial partisan blockages that are plaguing our nation.**
Tomorrow is Election Day. This is not a choice between political parties, but a referendum on partisanship. Politicians who use fear and mistrust to consolidate votes, who drive wedges between neighbors, and who define winning as the other party losing, have lost sight of the meaning of service.
You've done so much to help us realize this vision--now, I'm asking for your help for the last time. An hour or two of your time will make sure that, until the very last moment the polls close, we can keep getting our message out. [**_Please join our virtual phone bank today._**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-ciUqGWXgZlTzSVNpqUSlnA8kCBnb-cBZ-jdIpsXIA0=/kFbF0A3i5PVauDoTvN8TbU0t_7llWxsARTF1smEyU5Y=)
I'm humbled, honored, and grateful to be on this journey with you. Thank you for all you've done.
Jessica
** **
[CALL VOTERS FROM HOME](https://act.myngp.com/el/-ciUqGWXgZlTzSVNpqUSlnA8kCBnb-cBZ-jdIpsXIA0=/kFbF0A3i5PVauDoTvN8TbU0t_7llWxsARTF1smEyU5Y=)
---
** **

subject: Your final supporter record for Beto
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

Beto's been working hard on the campaign trail for more than 20 months,
listening to Texans in each of our state's 254 counties -- Republicans,
Democrats, Independents alike -- to learn more about the issues that
matter to all of our communities.

Every door knocked, every dollar donated, every Facebook live stream,
every single stop at Whataburger -- it's all brought us to this moment.
And the most recent poll shows Beto TIED with Ted Cruz, 49% - 49%. We can
win this race.

Right now, we need 53,261 contributions to reach our FINAL fundraising
goal of this campaign. Can you step up
with a donation of
$3
or more to help us cross the finish line?

Number of donations to hit FINAL goal for Beto: 53,261
Supporter name: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Most recent contribution: No
donation yet!
Suggested donation: $3

$3 »

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181105&t=1020&akid=24492%2E444211%2EQZP0A9 ]Beto for Texas

Beto's not just up against Ted Cruz: he's up against the ELEVEN outside
groups -- PACs and super PACs -- attacking him with negative, misleading
ads. And Beto hasn't slowed down. He’s kept his head high, stayed out on
the road, meeting with countless Texans, carrying his positive vision to
each community in our state.

Beto's been showing up for us. Now, we're calling on you to show up for
him, one last time. Every dollar that we raise in these final hours will
go directly into our last and largest ads and voter contact efforts, so
that we can get millions of voters to the polls tomorrow.

goal of this campaign. We’re just 53,261 donations short of our goal --
and this grassroots team has what it takes to bridge the gap.

Thank you so much for your support. As we finalize our spending decisions,
anything else you give before the deadline tonight will be a huge boost.

Thanks,

Team Beto

name: Tom O'Halleran
subject: this is the last time I'll ask
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
This is the last time you'll hear from me before Election Day. Tomorrow, we'll be shifting our efforts away from fundraising and focus entirely on our ambitious get-out-the-vote operation.
Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633ddf/1a8421e1/19b9f3b6a/497bf0dd/2895173237/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_header&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
_This is the last time you 'll hear from me before Election Day, friends._ My team on the ground is working hard to get our supporters to the polls tomorrow. This race is very close, but we're feeling optimistic, and I have you, our most committed supporters, to thank for that. Tomorrow, we'll be shifting our efforts away from fundraising and focus entirely on our ambitious get-out-the-vote operation. But before I sign off, I have one final request for you: [**Will you make a donation of any size tonight, so I can win this race tomorrow and keep AZ-01 blue?**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.05_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thank you again, friends, for **[your continued support](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.05_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") **in this race. You've armed my team with the resources to communicate our message to Arizona families, and I promise -- I won't stop fighting for you. See you on the other side, Tom | ****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.05_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****
---

**_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=footer-bio&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=").**_**

But before I sign off, I have one final request for you: "=" Thank you again, friends, for "=" in this race. You've armed my team with the resources to communicate our message to Arizona families, and I promise -- I won't stop fighting for you. See you on the other side, Tom | ** "=" Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please "=". ** Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Will I see you tonight in Richmond?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Hey Derek --

I'm getting ready to head to Tucker High School for my final campaign rally to get out the vote. Will you join me? [https://secure.timkaine.com/Rally](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1757/3e0906/7aab76a6/3e3772d5/1214555239/VEsH/ "https://events.mobilizeamerica.io/vavictory2018/event/82456/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+httpssecuretimkainecomRally&utm_campaign=20181105_4_FIELD_TK_Richmond-Rally&source=20181105_4_FIELD_TK_Richmond-Rally") Being out on the campaign trail for the last few months has been so much fun, and I'd love to close it down with you for one last event before Election Day. I'll be joined by my friends Mark Warner, Don McEachin, Ralph Northam, and Abigail Spanberger -- and we're going to hear some great music from the Cary Street Ramblers and Cowboys in the Campfire.

I hope you'll come out and celebrate with us tonight at JR Tucker High School at 7:00 PM -- and then tomorrow, we'll all go out and VOTE!

See you soon,

_Tim_

subject: Plan your vote: Here's an easy way to find your polling location
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaptur for Congress P
body:
| | | Dear Friend, All of the campaign ads, literature, and Get Out the Vote operations have led us to this moment. We’ve seen record-breaking early voting across the country. People understand the stakes of this election.
Tomorrow, November 6th, is your opportunity to send a message that we aren’t waiting until 2020 to be heard. It's your opportunity to turn out the culture of corruption and extreme partisan gerrymandering and to help put an to the one-party rule in Columbus and Washington.
Your voice is your vote and we need to speak out tomorrow. [Click here to quickly find your polling place](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mpss/c/CQE/ni0YAA/t.2mb/AXv5njbXT2WwnIfqdNuccA/h0/oiDRR8WVXqfMZ7swwXuKd35xJWO-2BRd8-2Bm47YyTjLsHBKtNGihJerISVXK5nfgAHPNyA6DxhVf01ABO1-2BNrOwG602KCOF4205iJRj4WpXIPtEIaMX4WnGTyH5CHgA3BQ1N9LWA-2BTAHjMr7eqA7x-2FcFgF2uw20e6gnI-2F90O3sLwrwEAAF2ADoXth-2BM4l4a-2Bgzvsq4vakncq6-2Bn9xve1Ovxt0r1KmAD3dyUHqjQY0D6pEJXUCRwskc-2Ff2t-2F7xRTYfkRJJVbnIXjYWiyHirkXOJ0-2Bie0A4MasFezc9TzUlqqgHT0xAy-2Bp0LBlmkR3Gc7BIGMx1rm-2FpF795NUXelmgrva03l1wl-2BEGU1pecJGTDJ0MjnhxD6lqdfXxpxRt-2BSiQ92-2FNm8-2B2t1XG3tG0XtjgE8asA-3D-3D), and make a plan for when you’re going to vote. Polls in Ohio open at 6:30 a.m and close at 7:30 pm. In the meantime, we continue to implement our strategy of mobilizing voters who have historically skipped the midterm elections and we are talking to newly registered voters. _[Please consider a last minute contribution to help us amplify our message to those voters – we know that when we vote, we win.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mpss/c/CQE/ni0YAA/t.2mb/AXv5njbXT2WwnIfqdNuccA/h1/aHO21LnX1DH2iKGsTPn3bYhi39zkK-2F5KLSrcx61KPVF56IysC6d9FMHnea8vrKZzxOQyACUjTvB7I7Be8o2NL-2F0d3sA2d72XrWBwsmGy1q5n40R8jyPoh2ShSNhKwGfdigh1msDYKBAr5awP-2Brkn9t-2BHHu5ZnDk63pr6138HSsMuOEBbDjyEC29XzzQiL-2FtK9dgBDKylb2qKcGR4tt-2Bwz5BhrYaYnjk2JCURKtnZPT4LhcYQIJEdqKHU4Rhr0pNkNl7oSvjGW9hkXI9d-2BuuoKoZ7hquTer64gdHEDnGda1lZsclXIfBPnpuzNYEVtfzLY-2BKvEA4lfHkaqVXVyVReVEiMGNHZ-2Bqrzg5TQNRXUbqWBE6L-2Bc2tRDPcndMOScW8U)_

clean_body: | | | Moments ago, Sherrod's opponent, multi-millionaire Congressman Jim Renacci, shared the stage with Donald Trump in Cleveland. He told the crowd that "Sherrod Brown is going to be gone tomorrow." "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" Peter -- Trump wouldn't be in Ohio if he didn't think he could make a difference in the outcome of this election. He also wouldn't support Jim Renacci unless he was sure Renacci will rubber-stamp the Trump agenda. Ohio families need a Senator who fights like hell for their interests -- not the special interests. But public polls show us losing ground. Renacci told the crowd that he's seen polls showing him defeating Sherrod. And if Trump's tactics work, we will lose. "" One day. Let's do this. Team Sherrod | | | "" | "" "" | | Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown Contributions or gifts to Friends of Sherrod Brown are not tax deductible.

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Tomorrow, we vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
Polls show that this race is a pure toss-up. We can win tomorrow, but we only will if all of our supporters turn out to vote, and I need your help tonight to make sure they do.
| | Peter, _Tomorrow is Election Day._ I had to pause for a moment after writing that sentence. It's been more than a year since I decided to run for Congress, and it's been something of a whirlwind ever since. I'm a first-time candidate for public office. It's been challenging at times. But the experience, above all, has been inspirational. I've had more deep, meaningful conversations about this community -- its strengths, its challenges, how we can make it better -- than I can count. And every caring, thoughtful person I've met across our district has filled me with hope and optimism for our future. Now, tomorrow, we will vote. Polls show that this race is a pure toss-up. **We can win tomorrow, but we only will if all of our supporters turn out to vote, and I need your help tonight to make sure they do.** [**Can you make a donation of any size, Peter, to support our get-out-the-vote efforts?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/L78iZ6wWvi66Iaue6mjEtzAmuKuRzKn8VCRdIOVMO3o=/4L0c6oughN6P7IWaXKxReaxpLra-FZ5jomqoFL4ntDs=?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.05_b3_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) We must knock every door and make every call we can tomorrow to win, and we won't be able to do so without your support. Thank you, Peter, for your support. We will win this race together. \- Abigail [](https://act.myngp.com/el/L78iZ6wWvi66Iaue6mjEtzAmuKuRzKn8VCRdIOVMO3o=/4L0c6oughN6P7IWaXKxReaxpLra-FZ5jomqoFL4ntDs=?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.05_b3_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/L78iZ6wWvi66Iaue6mjEtzAmuKuRzKn8VCRdIOVMO3o=/COxRAaoWGzIdeduBt29BA4qi3QWRKPm3CsmixI499D0=?refcode=footer&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/L78iZ6wWvi66Iaue6mjEtzAmuKuRzKn8VCRdIOVMO3o=/9SoK6dUS5Urmd5g0xr0uuSrMj9nyV5paE69fIYB_lW4=)_
| Paid for by Spanberger for Congress

name: Chris Evans, betofortexas.com
subject: Imagine the headlines
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

If you’re like me, you
do NOT want to wake up on November 7 to this headline:

“Ted Cruz Narrowly Hangs On, Defeating Challenger Beto O'Rourke For Six More
Years In Senate”

That’s what Cruz and his team want -- and that’s what the eleven outside
groups propping him up want too. They want to rewrite the story. To stop
us in our tracks. Erase all of our momentum. Make all of our hard work
look like an inconvenience in Cruz’s re-election campaign.

Wellwe can’t let that
happen. We need to deliver a stunning headline of our own:

“Beto O’Rourke Topples Senator Ted Cruz in Historic Grassroots Victory, Delivers
Major Victory For the People of Texas.”

But we’re only going to be able to do it if each and every single one of
Beto’s supporters does their part -- and I mean that. We’re counting on
everyone. We’re counting on you. So I’m asking again:

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181105&t=1019&akid=24519%2E444211%2EVWslqx ]Can you give a contribution of
$3
or more to Beto’s campaign to take on Ted Cruz? Help Beto reach his FINAL
fundraising goal of this campaign.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181105&t=1020&akid=24519%2E444211%2EVWslqx ]Contribute
$3
»

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181105&t=1021&akid=24519%2E444211%2EVWslqx ]Beto for Texas

Every single gift you give helps our ads stay up on the airwaves across
Texas, reminding voters to cast their ballots for Beto -- and it helps our
organizers stay out in the field, knocking on doors and reaching the
voters we need to contact before the polls close.

I’ve spent more than a year in the back seat of Beto’s minivan, traveling
across the state of Texas to each one of the 254 counties. I’ve learned so
much about this incredible state and the amazing people who live here.

But beyond that, I’ve seen the hardest working candidate we’ve ever
witnessed. You know it as well as I do -- Beto is caring, thoughtful and
dedicated. He’s humble and positive -- he really listens, and he’ll do
anything to help a person in need. I can’t imagine a better person to
represent Texas in the U.S. Senate.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181105&t=1022&akid=24519%2E444211%2EVWslqx ]Beto’s shown up for us, time and time again. Now, we need to show up
for him one last time. Pitch in
$3
or more to make sure we don’t fall short of our FINAL fundraising goal of
this campaign.

Let’s deliver historic news tomorrow night.

Talk soon,

Chris Evans
Beto for Texas

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181105&t=1024&akid=24519%2E444211%2EVWslqx ]Contribute
$3
»

subject: BREAKING: Tied Poll

body:

|

name: Phil Bredesen
subject: The last time
body:
|
#
Peter -- [**This is the last time in this race that I’m going to ask you to chip in whatever you can to our campaign.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/3039962/20059283/-1207524935?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGNkZjlmOS03NWUxLWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qebIFDFbI70ebE9j_gfpzLT6RpBGug5PxyaoLyZyuSI=&refcode=em181105-final&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=) Your support will help us with the final push heading into Election Day, including providing rides to the polls for seniors, social media outreach to millennials, and last-minute door-knocking and phone calls to make sure voters cast their ballots. **Before you chip in one more time, let me report to you on the final 48 hours of this campaign.** Yesterday, President Trump flew into Tennessee for the third time this year to stump for my opponent -- the surest sign that our race remains neck and neck, as confirmed by a new poll from East Tennessee State University. Hours before their rally inciting anger and incivility, I met with 500 Chattanooga faith leaders and community leaders to lay out my vision for the future of Tennessee and America -- a vision in which we can all do better working together. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/3039963/20059284/-1207524935?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGNkZjlmOS03NWUxLWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qebIFDFbI70ebE9j_gfpzLT6RpBGug5PxyaoLyZyuSI=&refcode=em181105-final&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=) At this point, the choice between my opponent and me couldn’t be clearer. Congresswoman Blackburn has been part of the Swamp for 16 years, running up the national debt, fueling the opioid epidemic, catering to special interests, and turning Congress into a body paralyzed by partisan gridlock. **If voters want more of the same, then I’m not their candidate.** But if voters want someone who brings experience in the business world, experience as a mayor and governor, and an interest in working with people to get things done, then I hope they’ll give me a shot to represent Tennessee again. I’m ready for the job. Today, I’m ending the campaign the same way we began -- with a statewide tour hitting the Tri-Cities, Knoxville, Clarksville, Jackson, Memphis, Nashville, and all throughout Tennessee to get folks fired up to vote on Election Day, tomorrow. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/3039964/20059285/-1207524935?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGNkZjlmOS03NWUxLWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qebIFDFbI70ebE9j_gfpzLT6RpBGug5PxyaoLyZyuSI=&refcode=em181105-final&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=) **Now with only hours left, I’m asking for your help one last time to help us win this thing tomorrow. Can you chip in whatever you can -- right now -- to help us fix Washington and make our government work for all Tennesseans and all Americans?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | ******[Chip in $10 Now »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/3039965/20059286/-1207524935?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGNkZjlmOS03NWUxLWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qebIFDFbI70ebE9j_gfpzLT6RpBGug5PxyaoLyZyuSI=&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em181105-final&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=)******
