---
******** ****
| ******[Another Amount »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/3039970/20059291/-1207524935?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGNkZjlmOS03NWUxLWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qebIFDFbI70ebE9j_gfpzLT6RpBGug5PxyaoLyZyuSI=&refcode=em181105-final&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=)******

************
Finally, let me end by saying thank you. Thank you for your moral and financial support. Thank you for participating in our democracy. And thank you for helping me change the conversation in this country. I’ve been humbled that I’ve been able to always ask for your help in these past few months, and you’ve delivered. Now... let’s go win this thing.
Thanks for being on my team,
Phil Bredesen

name: StaceyAbrams.com
subject: Your voting checklist:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
The only way we lose this election is if we stay home. So please: Prepare today. Vote tomorrow. |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa7e6/34a064cc/38cab9f/70ce009/2459370387/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Friend, The only way we lose this election is if we stay home. So please: Prepare today. Vote tomorrow. Here's what you need to do before the polls open tomorrow to ensure your vote is counted:
1. Check your polling location - It might have changed since the last time you voted, and it is likely different from the early voting location you saw advertised. **[Click here to double check that you are going to the right place.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa7e6/34a064cc/38cab9f/70ce016/2459370387/VEsE/ "https://www.georgiademocrat.org/vote/")**
2. Bring a photo ID - You need to show some sort of photo identification in order to vote. This is only to verify your name, not your address. Your ID does NOT need to match your current address. **[Click here for a full list of accepted forms of identification.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa7e6/34a064cc/38cab9f/70ce017/2459370387/VEsF/ "http://sos.ga.gov/index.php/elections/georgia_voter_identification_requirements2")**
3. Know your rights - Your right to vote is sacred. _Period_. Know your rights before you enter your polling location so if something is wrong, you can flag it right away. **[Click here for more information about your right to vote.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa7e6/34a064cc/38cab9f/70ce016/2459370387/VEsC/ "https://www.georgiademocrat.org/vote/")**

And if you run into ANY problems at the polls, call our **Voter Protection Hotline at 1-888-730-5816.**

We cannot afford to be tired or cynical. We cannot afford to sit this election out. The cost is too great to let someone else write our story or erase our progress. Tomorrow, we can make history. We can build a Georgia where everyone has the freedom and opportunity to thrive. Thank you for making your voice heard. \- Team Abrams P.S. Forward this email to three friends right now! Everyone needs to know how to get ready to cast a ballot tomorrow.

clean_body: The only way we lose this election is if we stay home. So please: Prepare today. Vote tomorrow. | "" | | | Friend, The only way we lose this election is if we stay home. So please: Prepare today. Vote tomorrow. Here's what you need to do before the polls open tomorrow to ensure your vote is counted: 1. Check your polling location - It might have changed since the last time you voted, and it is likely different from the early voting location you saw advertised. "" 2. Bring a photo ID - You need to show some sort of photo identification in order to vote. This is only to verify your name, not your address. Your ID does NOT need to match your current address. "" 3. Know your rights - Your right to vote is sacred. Period_. Know your rights before you enter your polling location so if something is wrong, you can flag it right away. "" And if you run into ANY problems at the polls, call our Voter Protection Hotline at 1-888-730-5816. We cannot afford to be tired or cynical. We cannot afford to sit this election out. | Friend, Election Day is tomorrow! **M****y opponent just released a poll showing a tied race. With rain forecasted for tomorrow, please send this email to your friends and urge them to vote no matter what! I need every single vote this year.** **A few key reasons I am running for re-election and seek your vote:**
* I’m running for re-election because we need someone in Congress who is unafraid of political insiders, someone who will fight for solutions that make a difference. With so much riding on this election, we cannot send another political insider to Washington.
* America is the “shining city on a hill” because of its freedom, yet today liberals are waging an unrelenting assault on our founding principles. I will continue to stand up to their assault and protect our constitutional freedoms. I have done that as your voice in Congress for the last two years, and it is now more critical than ever that we continue this positive change.
* We deserve better from our federal government. For too long, Washington has grown and the private sector has shrunk. I’ve worked to cut taxes and red tape, so you can prosper and our economy will thrive.

**You can learn more about my record on my website,[tedbudd.com](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xMDE4MzE0ODM5MDE1MDM2MjMyJmM9cjVsMCZlPTE5MjgmYj0yMTE5NzQ0ODAmZD1xM2UxazVn.i6q4VJPWuWqyL6HscQwbYnK4qgyDDeFMPYZckTU-ByY), or just by watching my first campaign ad this year [right here:](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xMDE4MzE0ODM5MDE1MDM2MjMyJmM9cjVsMCZlPTE5MjgmYj0yMTE5NzQ0ODImZD16MWYwazRv.wj3qeW6HvwyuDeS58JdSz-UINILpASV3RlbHIt8v1q4)**

body:
It's a bit hard to believe tomorrow is already Election Day. I'm really proud to work for Tom, and I'm also really proud of this team, which has put in so much time and effort over the past year to re
Friends, _Did you see Tom 's note below?_ It's a bit hard to believe tomorrow is already Election Day. I'm really proud to work for Tom, friends, and I'm also really proud of this team, which has put in so much time and effort over the past year to re-elect him. Arizona families deserve a committed, independent voice standing up for them in Washington, and that's Tom. I'm confident that voters will re-elect him tomorrow, but we're not taking our foot off the gas pedal, because this race is close and there's a lot at stake here. **[Chip in to our campaign if you can, so we can sprint through the finish line.](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.05_b3_rm_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Thanks, Ryan Mulcahy Campaign Manager \-----forwarded message----- From: Tom O'Halleran Subject: this is the last time I'll ask _This is the last time you 'll hear from me before Election Day, friends._ My team on the ground is working hard to get our supporters to the polls tomorrow. This race is very close, but we're feeling optimistic, and I have you, our most committed supporters, to thank for that. Tomorrow, we'll be shifting our efforts away from fundraising and focus entirely on our ambitious get-out-the-vote operation. But before I sign off, I have one final request for you: [**Will you make a donation of any size tonight, so I can win this race tomorrow and keep AZ-01 blue?**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.05_b3_rm_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thank you again, friends, for **[your continued support](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.05_b3_rm_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") **in this race. You've armed my team with the resources to communicate our message to Arizona families, and I promise -- I won't stop fighting for you. See you on the other side, Tom | ****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.05_b3_rm_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****
